    Text

    My heart soars just to look upon you. What do you need?
    h22485af2g9db7g4678g91ccg02dbbf6639cb | 7890ee28-ce26-45bb-bd9a-91151d3a6fcf | stub
    Speak to me, lover.
    h29729073g41bag4c4egbb72g9b9b7c09ec64 | a2dda3ff-9adb-4b4f-be63-6c8cae7d13bc | stub
    All of nature's bounty pales next to you. Do you need something?

      406.Player: I just wanted to see how you were faring.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d1655136-9946-b3be-4324-35ca565cf0caSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1d635545g6452g4c85g86fcg4fe8b8e2474aText UUID: 45188daa-9381-45d1-8b48-a2716b9ae118Show Once: True
      • •
        400.Halsin: With the end upon us? So long as I am surviving, and I have you by my side, I am faring as well as anyone can be.CURRENTREGION_END_Main

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • CURRENTREGION_END_Main {140b4d3e-6cc7-48cb-b66f-dbc4eba710e1} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ceed0e88-7350-2e39-102f-f773f476bdd6Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h984b71ffgc8fbg4a9cgb483gdd74e95f6f7dText UUID: d64ee6a9-ae40-4789-9ff0-dc4a823d2f63Timeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ceed0e88-7350-2e39-102f-f773f476bdd6Timeline Phase Duration: 11.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • •
        391.Halsin: My mind still drifts to that dream I shared with you, for a better future for all those who need it... but that must wait. I remain yours, of course. Ready when you need me.ORI_Halsin_State_HalsinsDream

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • ORI_Halsin_State_HalsinsDream {94959990-2e74-4cc9-3321-abb9bfd98b1f} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c9ca117b-cdcc-8d27-22e9-9ac32f533ad9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hba05aef7g4194g4bebg8609g7c2366142769Text UUID: ef6b38d6-2349-475b-bde8-b1f7e2646378Timeline Phase Index: 87Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c9ca117b-cdcc-8d27-22e9-9ac32f533ad9Timeline Phase Duration: 14.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • •
        27.Halsin: This city troubles me... but I am here for you. I want to be by your side, and see this through.CURRENTREGION_CTY_Main_A

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • CURRENTREGION_CTY_Main_A {d523976f-a39b-4d33-b6cb-f58b705a0396} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1087e67b-2580-c2b2-c366-0abce911e004Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf8ad2831gcf4fg4950ga997g2e5bb4422528Text UUID: f89c098a-8534-42a9-876b-54b130ae8242Timeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1087e67b-2580-c2b2-c366-0abce911e004Timeline Phase Duration: 9.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • •
        39.Halsin: This place is... not for me, perhaps. But with you by my side, and the shadow curse a fading memory, I shall keep my head high.CURRENTREGION_BGO_Main_A

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • CURRENTREGION_BGO_Main_A {11239767-48ad-4879-8312-b9164b6e4978} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 15eedc2b-1555-11e0-a6e7-1041286ba6d7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h42f0050cgfb5fg4389ga0b3gb3f85eb53624Text UUID: 4e318377-8694-4d81-b653-ac90397a1483Timeline Phase Index: 149Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 15eedc2b-1555-11e0-a6e7-1041286ba6d7Timeline Phase Duration: 11.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • •
        477.Halsin: We have challenges to surmount, of course, but with you by my side, my heart stays strong.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ffe58983-269a-baaf-de49-fd6597b9ea36Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hdb747555g98ffg4a4egb6cbgbca2284c5dfeText UUID: ebe13e25-56a1-481a-9a7b-90b1f325b13fTimeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ffe58983-269a-baaf-de49-fd6597b9ea36Timeline Phase Duration: 8.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      197.Player: How do you see our relationship?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 61f5391e-45f2-62df-3106-555c8336d0d8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc5e3475eg09e9g4c8dga909gd138ce936c45Text UUID: 75868dc4-8561-40b3-be6b-e3ef2e922823Show Once: True

        457.No Speaker: Alias to Node 250ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsin

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsin {7b53fe60-bb16-48a9-ae5c-9bce1dfac1a9} = True
        • •
          250.Halsin: You should feel free to roam as your heart desires. You are all I want, but I will not hoard you to myself. Let others know the happiness of being with you.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7f73f534-c771-1ea6-5827-f3b8ae94ba13Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h86a013cag55b5g4bcag95e7g682a1b32bea8Text UUID: c4caf102-1b48-44a2-8e92-f8637f90a87dTimeline Phase Index: 53Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7f73f534-c771-1ea6-5827-f3b8ae94ba13Timeline Phase Duration: 14.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • +
        384.Halsin: Relationship? Such terms belong to civilisation - a little unfamiliar to my lips. You know what we share is more fluid, more founded in the principles of nature.ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary {6af0be74-d032-4a20-876a-11bab5f86db2} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c6e90875-aa33-cbf2-3e49-2991724d56e1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9a5e13fbgfe4ag4866gb352gc81e2bd4eeceText UUID: 75db6ba7-8d95-4870-9d48-1b094395661bTimeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c6e90875-aa33-cbf2-3e49-2991724d56e1Timeline Phase Duration: 16.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • •
          460.Halsin: Indeed, I am but one of your lovers. You and I should each seek happiness, wherever it lies. You are all I want, but I will not hoard you to myself. Let others know the happiness of being with you.

          Text

          Indeed, I am but one of your lovers. You and I should each seek happiness, wherever it lies. You are all I want, but I will not hoard you to myself. Let others know the happiness of being with you.
          h188167cbgb8c9g40c8gbd6eg44f65affdf3f | 6310bf95-96fd-438e-81d2-e551d9e8392b | stub

        Text

        Always.
        h9a264557gaa82g4790g93degcc13b26d7d98 | 202144e9-e6e1-484d-8810-dfef34d3bcab | stub

                    99.Halsin: Was there something else you wanted, my heart?

                    Metadata

        211.Halsin: You have said as much to me before, only to change your mind. I told you your heart is your own, but I do not wish for mine to be toyed with. Are you certain?ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart {390fc777-7a7e-40ef-a8f7-c999b5b36f36} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 67b46f02-6429-f7a4-e3de-7f17520cc635Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9eb18257g5b3eg4363g89b0g93841c038b89Text UUID: 379c3abe-ae4a-4cf1-830c-5326ebc0d505Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 67b46f02-6429-f7a4-e3de-7f17520cc635Timeline Phase Duration: 14.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          122.Player: I am sorry, but it's over between us.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4056dd02-f7fc-9a5c-f8fd-953afbd87b83Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h49e487aagc76dg499bgbc14gb6d9e4f73005Text UUID: 07e0d1e4-224c-4556-8711-6e86a5cb88b4Show Once: True
          • +
            48.Halsin: Then... very well. This chapter is at an end. I can only hope you have many more, each filled with happiness.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b460f0e-524b-02c0-4e06-76cc88aba0e1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h257f017ag46e9g4473gba56g301b03ca9bfcText UUID: 78cd5fbe-391c-4c7b-9d19-bc87b4e26a78Timeline Phase Index: 210Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b460f0e-524b-02c0-4e06-76cc88aba0e1Timeline Phase Duration: 21.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 1b460f0e-524b-02c0-4e06-76cc88aba0e1Group Index: 0
            • •
              232.Halsin: I will remain by your side whenever you wish, of course. As ally, advisor, friend... in any way you desire, save for as a lover. [End]ORI_State_WasPartneredWithHalsin!ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsin!ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary

              Flags and Tags

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7405c165-701e-3029-df51-6c3a8d35d884Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h67109d8agd4e1g4d0dg830cg332a26e81bb2Text UUID: e7b562a6-c46f-48e2-8012-a52c5b9a6a7aEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 1b460f0e-524b-02c0-4e06-76cc88aba0e1Group Index: 1
        • +
          174.Player: I've changed my mind - I still want to be with you.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5817a622-3077-d9d5-03ab-9ed6e99b454fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1d9f8377g50d7g406dga494g14a7311673edText UUID: c4105a82-78dd-446d-b39a-e2cf3d06db80Show Once: True
          • •
            306.Halsin: Why would you test my patience like this? Sometimes it is difficult to love you. [End]ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart {390fc777-7a7e-40ef-a8f7-c999b5b36f36} = True

            Text

            Why would you test my patience like this? Sometimes it is difficult to love you.
            h5285be3fg5109g465aga07fgf6ccd721c497 | ebac18c5-d673-48a1-9e3e-9a017d98e309 | stub
            I warned you to not broach such matters lightly. Perhaps you care less for me than I supposed...
            h8f5a0447g05d7g48adg953egee2ca76f02b4 | 590c136c-7849-456b-bedc-df8c478a4b18 | stub
            Does it please you to see me crestfallen? That is the only reason I can think why you might toy with my heart like this.
            hbff4cd93gfcdeg45c5ga41eg9bed59105d46 | 46b82dc6-245f-4663-b303-a4ec69fe8c15 | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9af74f38-ebf1-6298-453f-d3d52384e9b7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text 1 Handle: h5285be3fg5109g465aga07fgf6ccd721c497Text 1 UUID: ebac18c5-d673-48a1-9e3e-9a017d98e309Text 2 Handle: h8f5a0447g05d7g48adg953egee2ca76f02b4Text 2 UUID: 590c136c-7849-456b-bedc-df8c478a4b18Text 3 Handle: hbff4cd93gfcdeg45c5ga41eg9bed59105d46Text 3 UUID: 46b82dc6-245f-4663-b303-a4ec69fe8c15Timeline 1 Phase Index: 203Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: 9af74f38-ebf1-6298-453f-d3d52384e9b7Timeline 1 Phase Duration: 8.88sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 2 Phase Index: 204Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: 9af74f38-ebf1-6298-453f-d3d52384e9b7Timeline 2 Phase Duration: 6.69sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 3 Phase Index: 205Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: 9af74f38-ebf1-6298-453f-d3d52384e9b7Timeline 3 Phase Duration: 7.44sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 1Timeline 4 Phase Index: 209Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: 9af74f38-ebf1-6298-453f-d3d52384e9b7Timeline 4 Phase Duration: 8.88sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 1End Node: TrueUnmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
          • •
            175.Halsin: I am glad you have reconsidered, but please don't trivially bring up such difficult topics. My heart can be wounded just like any other. [End]ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart

            Flags and Tags

            settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_Halsin_State_PlayedWithHalsinsHeart {390fc777-7a7e-40ef-a8f7-c999b5b36f36} = True

      • +
        65.Halsin: I see... if that is truly your desire, then I shall respect it. No matter how much I wish it was not the case.

        Metadata

      281.Player: I wanted to speak to you about the night we spent together.!CAMP_Halsin_Event_DeclinedSex!ORI_Halsin_State_SexFollowUpGLO_Halsin_HadSexORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinORI_Halsin_State_SexFollowUp

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 90c37283-b320-af6d-18d4-6b5c1ef9c44eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4c58977bg6a0ag417dga2f3gaf5ca55234b1Text UUID: 69e2d4cf-26f4-4baf-8c2a-69bfd8e017daShow Once: True
      • +
        284.Halsin: That was something I had dreamed about for some time... and now I realise just how woefully meagre my dreams were, compared to the reality.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 916bdbc7-5a61-cd05-275c-32c5e86a936aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha068132bg938cg4c1bg8f12gfeb476f40725Text UUID: 75642fac-9b99-41aa-b913-c17c2ee81acbTimeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 916bdbc7-5a61-cd05-275c-32c5e86a936aTimeline Phase Duration: 20.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 916bdbc7-5a61-cd05-275c-32c5e86a936aGroup Index: 0
        • +
          247.Halsin: I would still be there with you now, if the sun hadn't intruded on us, and the city hadn't stirred for the day.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7db5f409-c8fe-957d-f04d-7bd7b8af1cbfSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h37a9d797g9064g4909ga15cgb1871dc03ac1Text UUID: f87e7f92-d164-4480-ae20-d493c610193aGroup ID: 916bdbc7-5a61-cd05-275c-32c5e86a936aGroup Index: 1
          • +
            251.Player: I'd been dreaming about that as well. It was perfect.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 803cbfa6-e570-0a4e-4b70-e776c8bfa7d7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc643e387gea51g46bfg8200g98b09535e64aText UUID: 3c2eedb2-d016-4468-aa18-b4547c255426Show Once: True
            • +
              256.Halsin: No, don't say that. Perfect would mean there is nothing left to explore.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 83c29c22-2b78-a919-b2b2-648ba5cc28bbSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: he8e09ba0gdb03g48c0g8edcg812436a1d81fText UUID: 1046af00-083d-4c8e-b191-589d46d0cb44Timeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 83c29c22-2b78-a919-b2b2-648ba5cc28bbTimeline Phase Duration: 10.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 83c29c22-2b78-a919-b2b2-648ba5cc28bbGroup Index: 0
              • +
                186.Halsin: And I see plenty to lose myself in.

                Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 598f0f86-0c9b-9d23-31e6-b9c5515ceb10Jump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
          • +
            84.Player: I would have stayed. The populace could do with a show. Take their minds off things.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2a2e057f-71d5-8a6b-d386-c752ea3a23f7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf7848826g51a1g474eg89ceg0b1a6b2ee4d0Text UUID: 0462a1b9-319a-4282-a7d5-c55e71c75266Show Once: True
            • +
              357.Halsin: I had heard the municipal laws regarding large animals had been struck down... but still, perhaps we were wise to not push our luck. This time.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b72aeb4b-974b-1b70-c9b1-e5c8a057fc23Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h116817c9g49b8g482fgb21fg367cf058257bText UUID: 0155ee65-1baf-433f-93a1-e315d69ce7d3Timeline Phase Index: 33Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b72aeb4b-974b-1b70-c9b1-e5c8a057fc23Timeline Phase Duration: 12.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • See Node 179 Jump to Node 338
          • +
            92.Player: Perhaps a bed next time. Just to be different.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2dc2aa5f-0109-a7a2-8c19-607845f44226Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h42bc70ebg6003g4a14gbf65g469358e2b02eText UUID: 396923ae-c65e-496c-a8e3-a82aeebbd437Show Once: True
            • +
              310.Halsin: I am open to anything - if you can find a piece of furniture that is up to the challenge.

              Metadata

          • +
            424.Player: I feel closer to nature, now that nature's been inside me.Druid

              318.Halsin: We were as one. The warmth of your skin, the feel of your...

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a159b65e-7152-0d6a-bbd2-685aee7cac7fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h97d92105g0cf2g4c9dg80b4gd893f5245ae8Text UUID: 89e909f7-504d-4c8a-bcbb-59a455f5df45Timeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a159b65e-7152-0d6a-bbd2-685aee7cac7fTimeline Phase Duration: 17.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: a159b65e-7152-0d6a-bbd2-685aee7cac7fGroup Index: 0
              • +
                157.Halsin: ...I must be careful, or I'll lose the run of myself again. An Archdruid should show some restraint.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50f66695-4f2b-c6d3-5781-104955cfb44fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h5531151ag644bg4723g861fgf3628bcc6644Text UUID: a68d17a6-7f92-440a-9cfe-27f6d4b4f7e8Group ID: a159b65e-7152-0d6a-bbd2-685aee7cac7fGroup Index: 1
                • See Node 179 Jump to Node 338
          • +
            102.Player: It was intense. In a good way.CAMP_Halsin_Event_SexWithBearForm

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global
            • CAMP_Halsin_Event_SexWithBearForm {eecac008-77e9-4fb8-a26f-1e46ebfe25f1} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 30a65691-0cd6-f74c-44a5-a1f5112fee06Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h59b4a314g224dg4641gbecfg47e0ca6ebb0bText UUID: e8408588-435e-4c15-be27-578ef9f4549aShow Once: True
            • +
              320.Halsin: Are you sure? Holding back is not in my nature, but I would not wish to alarm you, or harm you.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a3880cf8-199f-19a6-0235-4e81a59a756dSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8a46fc45ga1dbg439ag80b1g9cbc6a73e397Text UUID: 38f64e2b-d17a-48d0-9dbf-94f95c6afc24Timeline Phase Index: 23Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a3880cf8-199f-19a6-0235-4e81a59a756dTimeline Phase Duration: 9.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                431.Player: Don't worry. I have strong tastes and a big appetite.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: dee19410-715e-8bb3-e842-8f03feb2b9ebSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd4c823a2g6bd9g4494g998dg6495b5d9ded3Text UUID: d8e95eef-e210-466c-a9c4-51c40d82392cShow Once: True
                • +
                  221.Halsin: As I discovered. It isn't so often that the bear is the one being eyed hungrily.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d3f83bf-d3ea-21c6-33aa-11444a60f0b9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h5ad36943gcaf7g458bgb88bgf9731fdb6270Text UUID: 6fe65eb5-b77c-4e43-8c64-d827a24feadeTimeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6d3f83bf-d3ea-21c6-33aa-11444a60f0b9Timeline Phase Duration: 6.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    69.Halsin: Perhaps fate will afford us more time together - I hope it does.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 216c52d9-92aa-2a6e-fc4c-bf91349dc3caSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h469eb473g9af1g40ddg8c99gf8f778d4079fText UUID: 18eeba10-f2bb-4887-b262-d778ea18f424Timeline Phase Index: 112Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 216c52d9-92aa-2a6e-fc4c-bf91349dc3caTimeline Phase Duration: 7.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • •
                      373.Jump to Node 338

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: c1572acb-8965-6c2b-261e-cd6084c1a7d0Jump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
              • +
                124.Player: It was certainly different. But I have no regrets.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 42b83406-7ac4-e186-5bed-8d463fef4924Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0cb65b7cgb191g44c1g8127g2369d447c484Text UUID: c4bc1ecc-751f-44d5-92e7-6edb51ccf5b1Show Once: True
                • +
                  469.Halsin: Nor I. At my age, I've come to see that little is worth regretting in the long run, apart from regrets themselves.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9a13303-d83b-c276-4db9-5cc033115af3Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h1c17bc7egd473g43cag8cdfg56e7331b6263Text UUID: fca5df24-b11f-41e2-af74-8d6c2801ca8eTimeline Phase Index: 68Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f9a13303-d83b-c276-4db9-5cc033115af3Timeline Phase Duration: 9.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 69 (Halsin) Perhaps fate will afford us more time together - I hope it does.
              • +
                442.Player: We're all adults here. Though some of us may be walking a little stiffly for a while...

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ea9441f7-6df0-c632-4e4e-44c6b8be86a0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3fe7dbcfg7106g432cgb961g56e7e07cc212Text UUID: 74eec887-bc3d-4a75-af39-56839c766aebShow Once: True
                • +
                  248.Halsin: I can imagine. You rode out the storm most admirably.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7df4f3bd-c89a-8cca-234f-2de28ccfcd1eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8f98e934g3e72g4c29g9492gb4d68ded402dText UUID: 99d61514-dfb6-4387-b5e2-d210f546dca3Timeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7df4f3bd-c89a-8cca-234f-2de28ccfcd1eTimeline Phase Duration: 5.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 69 (Halsin) Perhaps fate will afford us more time together - I hope it does.
          • +
            46.Player: I don't think we can do this again.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1b109995-e0c8-5409-bb5b-beafcea2ae34Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hee5f86abg1e89g470dgacf9gf06e5481a9efText UUID: 52434bae-7879-4d80-abb4-21d3b0a502f6Show Once: True
            • +
              439.Halsin: Of course... That is your right.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e68784a4-55be-68e1-e442-6c57a2f74e33Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0fac1057gcf18g47c6g96b2g060bd609f702Text UUID: bb57ca61-c61e-4248-a203-3ece7778d862Timeline Phase Index: 81Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e68784a4-55be-68e1-e442-6c57a2f74e33Timeline Phase Duration: 4.44sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • See Node 179 Jump to Node 338
      • +
        106.Halsin: A short night, at that. I am sorry if I came on too strongly. Take all the time and space you require.CAMP_Halsin_Event_DeclinedSex

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • CAMP_Halsin_Event_DeclinedSex {56e0dd18-e73b-42fa-9072-58d28c79ee0a} = True

        • +
          26.Halsin: Perhaps our time has not yet come. Perhaps dealing with the Absolute must come first. Whatever you decide, I will understand.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1060e21b-ba3a-83e5-8c64-d12916aa2b02Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hc651ed83gcf32g4458g8d81gfa36e646d4feText UUID: b6ab9065-7307-4ae7-b6d9-400d3facc093Group ID: 367d5d98-da4a-9887-dde8-496a32cdaec2Group Index: 1
          • +

            Metadata

      261.Player: I wanted to speak to you about the night we spent together.!CAMP_Halsin_Event_DeclinedSex!ORI_Halsin_State_SexFollowUpGLO_Halsin_HadSexORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondaryORI_Halsin_State_SexFollowUp

      • See Node 284 (Halsin) That was something I had dreamed about for some time... and now I realise just how woefully meagre my dreams were, compared to the reality.
      • See Node 106 (Halsin) A short night, at that. I am sorry if I came on too strongly. Take all the time and space you require.

    377.Halsin: Nature has been most kind to let me share in your heart. What do you need?ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary {6af0be74-d032-4a20-876a-11bab5f86db2} = True

    Text

    Nature has been most kind to let me share in your heart. What do you need?
    hc49abaddg8889g4914g8677g3d698f088448 | 80afcb84-32d4-42a4-8f92-b9d075565d74 | stub
    You truly are a feast for my eyes - nature outdid itself with you. Did you wish to speak?
    hcc12761fgc527g4543g8e16g74f8c1e4a293 | 70fb93eb-feac-483f-a4b4-857f7992f7df | stub
    I have longed to hear your voice. Speak to me.
    heaec2b0eg995eg4746gb0d2g614b7ebcc8be | 76c89079-0175-4248-961e-08c907ed6f31 | stub
    What word, my love?
    hcc66eceegd166g49e4g9449g637fe7cdc275 | a8930f98-bb24-4f73-a8d3-ae46f056f94f | stub

    Metadata

    338.Halsin: Oak Father preserve you.

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0d92a5e9gc2b8g401ag997fg29be020becc6Text UUID: 996126c9-9b41-422a-a0ba-8e26631cdd09Timeline Phase Index: 6Timeline Dialog Node UUID: addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800aTimeline Phase Duration: 2.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Root: True
    • +
      345.Player: How are you? You weren't harmed when Orin took you, I hope?LOW_BhaalTemple_State_WasAbductedHalsin!ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpAfterAbductionWYR_Orin_IPRD_CompanionReturned

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global

      • WYR_Orin_IPRD_CompanionReturned {8d7f983e-864d-2209-64d9-49416d4a0d3b} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: afa92c08-bd6b-67c4-85f4-9bd568d404f2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h93443065gb90ag4544g8791gceb5bff863c4Text UUID: 689c5e8a-6fb9-42cc-8729-88d604af51bfShow Once: True
      • +
        264.Halsin: Just my pride - I can't believe I allowed myself to be knocked unconscious and spirited away like that...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 88be6452-4b25-b307-8b21-2b409ed9b0cfSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0692c0d7g059bg4093gbabbg37c2783417cdText UUID: 31754444-ce16-4500-9898-aba951a2d3b0Timeline Phase Index: 153Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 88be6452-4b25-b307-8b21-2b409ed9b0cfTimeline Phase Duration: 21.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 88be6452-4b25-b307-8b21-2b409ed9b0cfGroup Index: 0
        • +
          107.Halsin: Impressive that she managed to move my bulk, come to think of it. I wonder how that was managed.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38673381-8395-a683-9bb8-d92f1b65347bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf2a8b8e2ga7b4g440cg80acge0b96c50acf1Text UUID: f70f94ca-b8ab-4f49-904b-36bfdc693c62Group ID: 88be6452-4b25-b307-8b21-2b409ed9b0cfGroup Index: 1
          • •
            218.Halsin: But in either case, it seems I was insensible for much of my ordeal. Small mercies.ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpAfterAbduction

            Flags and Tags

            settype Global
            • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpAfterAbduction {291728e3-7d19-48e1-93d5-828ba3033830} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c26c817-b2d9-e306-7a03-970268de7f42Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h64b8c251g9629g4887g81d9g1f2fdc6024bfText UUID: 9f9ce79a-26ce-4a61-87e1-26b3d454aa85Group ID: 88be6452-4b25-b307-8b21-2b409ed9b0cfGroup Index: 2
    • +
      156.Player: Are you still content at my side? This doesn't have to be your fight, and it's certainly not your typical habitat.ORI_Halsin_State_ReadyForDream!ORI_Halsin_State_HalsinsDreamCURRENTREGION_CTY_Main_AORI_Halsin_State_HalsinsDream

      Flags and Tags

      settype Global
      • ORI_Halsin_State_HalsinsDream {94959990-2e74-4cc9-3321-abb9bfd98b1f} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 50abbeb9-8d81-6e8c-f00f-00160b2f76e5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0142fd2fg113ag4bc3g83d7g6c10386d3b3dText UUID: 8b15a23b-8c21-4cee-953d-c60e1ea70b38Show Once: True
      • +
        181.Halsin: The city, you mean? With all its noise, smoke, stone, and bustle? I would not be here, given the choice... but I promised you my support. And that is what you shall have.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h6055f3f9g462fg4158g93fbga7f475db44f5Text UUID: 967b0744-0cda-4ffa-93c3-fd7101f557edTimeline Phase Index: 154Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adTimeline Phase Duration: 78.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 10Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 0
        • +
          394.Halsin: Still, though... this place crawls with life, but little of it flourishes. I see refugees, unhoused. The destitute, unwanted. Orphans, unloved.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cbeee477-fed5-5d27-730f-4ed12806902fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h6c3add52g4535g47cag884dg227ca9bc2830Text UUID: 29bb0bbe-6bb9-428b-82ee-119f5c745641Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 1
          • +
            191.Halsin: The city is like a forest with an overgrown canopy. Light and nourishment cannot penetrate to those who need it the most...

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e5431d3-4cf5-f525-e0fa-1b0488964d61Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hbba1265cgeeddg4306gbaa1g56228fcce7e1Text UUID: 6c0cf2a5-76c7-49a2-8f21-a7906cb965b6Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 2
            • +
              103.Halsin: ...and still it draws them in. The safety of numbers. The promise of civilisation. The dream of better.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3258a492-3f96-d193-4ce1-9589c768a565Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h45cba412g6b4bg47c5g857cg9f7b9049c311Text UUID: 83671565-17e4-4ad1-b84d-c89d6ca5da35Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 3
              • +
                388.Halsin: All that potential is too often destined to die in the dark, and rot in the gutter.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c918afe2-bdce-40ef-f908-5c1517f9bc07Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3382a831g6dc7g457dg997dgf1647a7ec4d8Text UUID: f011fc5f-47ba-4465-9615-ce4873a70168Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 4
                • +
                  353.Halsin: I wish... I wish there was a better way. I wish everyone could see the sun, have a full belly, and know nature as a friend. There is a balance that is yet to be found.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b571bcb1-2c3a-caac-561b-31c39c695ac7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0964d83bg1d66g4d24g98c9g108fa8212c2fText UUID: f0baece3-002f-4feb-8535-744c30e92e52Group ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 5
                  • +
                    203.Halsin: Listen to me, preaching like an initiate in his cups.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 64035b2d-efbd-d094-3177-e56552dde085Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h31c2fe13g0b2eg41f3gabd3gd9d4cb2ee865Text UUID: e7e437d4-8626-4e76-88e9-6f6cf4f11feeGroup ID: 5b5d9e91-4aef-96da-b9f5-c4579ee494adGroup Index: 6
                    • +
                      209.Player: It's a fine dream. Perhaps you can help find the balance.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 675f71ef-5a72-3895-d853-aa9e35607a38Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h791c5a14g05c1g4b62gba33g40fe88e6b32aText UUID: 2bc9c683-d200-403a-8e73-6df61c2d7828Show Once: True
                      • +
                        244.Halsin: Yes... I hope so. But we have a battle to win, before any of that.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7b77ac1e-4db4-802c-1edf-d9dd32ea845fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8c574fbegd258g4cb0gbaf7ge02e12ad3a27Text UUID: 3c6b6029-cc07-4265-9780-d8faa1a1d494Timeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7b77ac1e-4db4-802c-1edf-d9dd32ea845fTimeline Phase Duration: 6.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • •
                          120.Jump to Node 338

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 3f401d00-db53-0dcd-4eeb-40df361beeccJump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
                    • +
                      398.Player: I didn't expect such naivety in an Archdruid of your vintage.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ce07e5c2-c791-d561-c8e9-fd965425fda4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf5c279e5g18bfg44e7gab35gb53bbdeb7573Text UUID: 2befaf05-9862-46cf-8d0e-29e97be5e7dcShow Once: True
                      • +
                        123.Halsin: I outgrew cynicism around the age of 200. I offer no apologies for my desires.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42190046-1a17-6e84-1c32-6b6ec9350e67Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha7a9a7fbgf5f1g40c0g9a87g67104325af3aText UUID: 81bc4c64-de58-48f7-a80e-743e005d827fTimeline Phase Index: 181Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42190046-1a17-6e84-1c32-6b6ec9350e67Timeline Phase Duration: 5.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • +
                          355.Halsin: But that must wait for now - there are battles yet to be fought. We must save the world before we can dream of ways to better it.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b65c480c-6212-6e64-7a37-c88995948f50Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3f9a2dffg3df7g4a29ga779g570aa6bfe3fdText UUID: d8b22a31-7aae-45c3-bd37-8bbbf1393ceeTimeline Phase Index: 32Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b65c480c-6212-6e64-7a37-c88995948f50Timeline Phase Duration: 9.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                          • See Node 120 Jump to Node 338
                    • +
                      3.Player: The city isn't perfect, but neither is nature. It's dangerous to idealise one thing at the expense of another.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 014989f6-98ad-1a19-2918-7e8a293adac6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5b030a82g570fg4460ga279gaa7a9e1602acText UUID: 106c0943-aa1a-47a7-a50d-9da97646cfc5Show Once: True
                      • +
                        459.Halsin: You are right. But such... drastic times can make it difficult to preserve nuance in one's thinking. Further reflection is needed.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f4e8e0e5-085a-db8d-0fc1-cd2b6c8b1b0eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8127ad37g67d1g4a4bg9941g2ec1ae3dbe34Text UUID: 1ae7b30a-18bb-44c0-a875-076ac47da59cTimeline Phase Index: 63Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f4e8e0e5-085a-db8d-0fc1-cd2b6c8b1b0eTimeline Phase Duration: 11.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • See Node 355 (Halsin) But that must wait for now - there are battles yet to be fought. We must save the world before we can dream of ways to better it.
                    • +
                      112.Player: Tough choices lie ahead. This is no time for bleeding hearts.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3a27315d-08d2-c05a-5ac6-8686141c0652Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5326aff2ge353g4c70g923eg9a59cb4465b0Text UUID: 53e7ab37-ccd0-434c-86c6-3ced2d0a1742Show Once: True
                      • +
                        271.Halsin: I shall not falter from what must be done, but I cannot ignore what I see, either.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8b6a6d44-a90e-76e8-34e1-894883f3ecf3Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9be7628agf50eg4da2g8b6dg2e14889cf4d2Text UUID: a3b79374-aea2-468d-b3d6-0f023e09282eTimeline Phase Index: 43Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8b6a6d44-a90e-76e8-34e1-894883f3ecf3Timeline Phase Duration: 6.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • See Node 355 (Halsin) But that must wait for now - there are battles yet to be fought. We must save the world before we can dream of ways to better it.
                    • +
                      441.Player: You speak nothing but truths.Druid

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Druid {44ac4317-4d38-4d28-80e2-94024c6e42f0} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e9dbd2a3-d626-3efa-9c90-51e963f332d1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3ec550dfgc196g4fbdgb7ccg6f79cdd4ab5fText UUID: 49dde3d6-2e5b-4f0a-8466-d5b25d25f9c9Show Once: True
                      • +
                        17.Halsin: Perhaps, but words alone are not enough...

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 097c0e56-ee37-05ff-bdca-874da6e5732bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0f6adc46gfaddg40efgbafega9428d89963eText UUID: 61049dcf-3cc7-43d2-8827-9005d40ba5bdTimeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 097c0e56-ee37-05ff-bdca-874da6e5732bTimeline Phase Duration: 3.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • See Node 355 (Halsin) But that must wait for now - there are battles yet to be fought. We must save the world before we can dream of ways to better it.
                    • +
                      405.Player: This is my home you're talking about - it's not some pit of despair.Baldurian

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Baldurian {f15e9b0d-676c-4f52-9abf-365cff89ef0f} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d0ddcdd4-b88f-4707-018e-a5e8a819f01bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h78708401g170eg442agb139gd9a8ac0e8e9cText UUID: 4c603463-3eb8-4179-bd1f-037ccd5d61c1Show Once: True
                      • +
                        190.Halsin: Some can thrive here, yes. But it was never meant for everyone. There should be a choice. Nature should be afforded its chance to offer harmony to those who need it.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e45f124-9842-729b-7ab5-93a0fa8a023eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h55b6b278g590ag43a2gbaceg9d9a246d7ef1Text UUID: aee6640f-60e0-4779-9c0f-0bc9e5846b6dTimeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e45f124-9842-729b-7ab5-93a0fa8a023eTimeline Phase Duration: 10.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                        • See Node 355 (Halsin) But that must wait for now - there are battles yet to be fought. We must save the world before we can dream of ways to better it.
    • +
      237.Player: Have you heard from Thaniel since we moved on?VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A!ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpWithThanielGLO_LiftingTheCurse_State_BreathHasBeenRestored

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = True
      • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpWithThaniel {a7bb34ad-b667-4a32-8b20-de9075dc0e1f} = False
      • GLO_LiftingTheCurse_State_BreathHasBeenRestored {2113b54e-a140-4aa0-97ac-219fa7b7d038} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 77f0db9b-3911-e37e-4ec3-3259b45a1c3dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: haed044e1ge20ag43d1g8ec2g2037422cace5Text UUID: 5a3a04ff-8b14-4db0-97c9-98b77838f29cShow Once: True
      • +
        144.Halsin: I have. He speaks to me during my nightly meditations.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a2aef6a-5964-8fa0-6506-ced90e262aa0Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h22759dd1g79afg4692g82ecg49dcec991a1cText UUID: 679f9588-a827-4cfe-bea5-0666df438ac0Timeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4a2aef6a-5964-8fa0-6506-ced90e262aa0Timeline Phase Duration: 26.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 4a2aef6a-5964-8fa0-6506-ced90e262aa0Group Index: 0
        • +
          314.Halsin: He is well - and Oliver also. At times they are one, and at others they divide. Easier for playing, perhaps. And the land thrives also. I doubt you would recognise it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0231415-0fcd-5c41-8c57-3aaa97c17796Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd9d794bbg3acfg4e39gae34g3bfb136ed456Text UUID: 4be40df8-ba70-4d41-b269-bf67e7877c58Group ID: 4a2aef6a-5964-8fa0-6506-ced90e262aa0Group Index: 1
          • •
            12.Halsin: Perhaps one day you and I can both return, and see it for ourselves.ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpWithThaniel

            Flags and Tags

            settype Global
            • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpWithThaniel {a7bb34ad-b667-4a32-8b20-de9075dc0e1f} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0835dbd5-d706-2afd-c72e-53c581b2fc84Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: he2cadccfg8e04g4897ga66bg0a984748caa9Text UUID: ae143560-9fa8-4691-967d-3b01efc0eb5aGroup ID: 4a2aef6a-5964-8fa0-6506-ced90e262aa0Group Index: 2
    • +
      83.Player: I am sorry about Yenna. I wish things had gone differently.LOW_BhaalTemple_Event_PlayerOrderedYennaDeath!ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • LOW_BhaalTemple_Event_PlayerOrderedYennaDeath {eb76c8ca-c314-47f6-a806-c22568aff864} = True
      • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna {e5fb8240-4da0-4b82-9c4a-36503460daaa} = False

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 29ca0105-13e5-3797-ff3c-df908d2f36feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5ec8e017gcbdbg4eb9g9735g6f44691071feText UUID: 4644a749-c5e6-46f3-a272-c605cbedb681Show Once: True
      • +
        94.Halsin: You thought she was an imposter - a threat. This was a trap of Orin's creation. Yenna's death is on her hands, not yours.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2eee97f9-daaf-cc2a-3731-873533480830Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9835c93eg6d58g466cg8781g2068329c57a5Text UUID: 832e9d25-7ee4-450f-ad04-1f56fcc12f63Timeline Phase Index: 152Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2eee97f9-daaf-cc2a-3731-873533480830Timeline Phase Duration: 29.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 2eee97f9-daaf-cc2a-3731-873533480830Group Index: 0
        • +
          225.Halsin: But still... we all failed that little girl.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f40df15-f681-ba4e-5c2d-a1589ee96a53Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3ceeec07gfbdag4219g8d11gdbcd9e7f0430Text UUID: 24707425-40f1-4c49-b938-d8b135406331Group ID: 2eee97f9-daaf-cc2a-3731-873533480830Group Index: 1
          • •
            47.Halsin: Killing Orin won't bring Yenna back, but it may give her some peace, and me... a great deal of satisfaction.ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna

            Flags and Tags

            settype Global
            • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna {e5fb8240-4da0-4b82-9c4a-36503460daaa} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b14f224-9d2c-e494-0fea-9e03eff5e0d1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hbbe2f43eg9b62g4062ga812g6a0eff26fb3bText UUID: 20abbf8d-a4b0-4102-b514-7080689b9d24Group ID: 2eee97f9-daaf-cc2a-3731-873533480830Group Index: 2
    • +
      172.Player: Can Oliver even be found, after what happened? Our chances of lifting the curse may be ruined...!SCL_OliversDiary_Event_RestoreAtHouseSCL_OliversDiary_State_DefeatedAtHouseSCL_OliversDiary_Event_OliverAppearsCAMP_GLO_State_InCampSCL_ShadowCurse_Knows_Oliver_Is_Thaniel

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 576ff094-1156-8c6f-be0a-f9e57f459dfcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha444e879g253eg4664g9d80g5b38dac7d75dText UUID: 58d1bcd6-ab8e-4761-8e44-05483d4e738aShow Once: True
      • •
        414.Halsin: Perhaps not - if he truly is a part of Thaniel, then he is beyond life and death. More likely he's just hiding. We should return to where you saw him.SCL_OliversDiary_Event_RestoreAtHouse

        Flags and Tags

        settype Global
        • SCL_OliversDiary_Event_RestoreAtHouse {29634249-bce8-4332-9683-0860f129184c} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d6a24b83-9a2f-afb8-398e-ac0435be5d02Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h4d42272bg2a86g4b78g870dgf7d259c814d3Text UUID: 3b52dd59-1c6a-46cc-8fd8-91397f2ad912Timeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d6a24b83-9a2f-afb8-398e-ac0435be5d02Timeline Phase Duration: 13.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
    • +
      56.Player: Poor Yenna... How are you holding up?LOW_BhaalTemple_State_OrinLaezelKillsYenna!ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • LOW_BhaalTemple_State_OrinLaezelKillsYenna {84065b20-4337-4010-87d7-0a62f855298c} = True
      • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna {e5fb8240-4da0-4b82-9c4a-36503460daaa} = False

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1e3f8018-bfd2-033b-4642-7ef45c1bf88fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h38e1f777gdd75g4b37g8d51gd53167318406Text UUID: 4fbecc71-0232-42a5-88ee-832c89b41e09Show Once: True
      • +
        206.Halsin: I thought we would be able to help her. I thought we would be able to keep her safe.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6525ac41-4a83-578c-8294-5ba537b33c5fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9d2153c2ge3d4g4c24gaae3g377e236bebbfText UUID: ab0be43a-023f-4817-9ebe-109b1d099c3fTimeline Phase Index: 122Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6525ac41-4a83-578c-8294-5ba537b33c5fTimeline Phase Duration: 22.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 6525ac41-4a83-578c-8294-5ba537b33c5fGroup Index: 0
        • +
          89.Halsin: No matter how long I live, I will never get used to the cruelties that infest our world. That such evil is allowed to breathe the same air as us is an abomination.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2cb6ee80-79ee-5950-e6c0-5c870034cfa5Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd2525586g0b84g4713g9c3agd0f96638dce6Text UUID: 7c94e8f4-febd-476b-9a16-f4268f5779bcGroup ID: 6525ac41-4a83-578c-8294-5ba537b33c5fGroup Index: 1
          • •
            443.Halsin: There must be no more Yennas.ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna

            Flags and Tags

            settype Global
            • ORI_Halsin_State_FollowedUpYenna {e5fb8240-4da0-4b82-9c4a-36503460daaa} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eab72264-5458-d3d0-e68b-c9b60a32c02dSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7ea8bdaag3c5dg45ddg8950g88b2566291f1Text UUID: efd9caf7-28b7-4fd1-88c5-bab7c0bd7e78Group ID: 6525ac41-4a83-578c-8294-5ba537b33c5fGroup Index: 2
    • +
      35.Player: I don't think those two drow will be forgetting us in a hurry.!ORI_Halsin_Event_DapperDrowFolllowUpWYR_DapperDrow_Event_IntimacyDoneORI_State_PartneredWithHalsin!ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondaryWYR_DapperDrow_State_HadGroupIntimacyORI_Halsin_Event_DapperDrowFolllowUp

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 14913945-1d98-f5d5-ccd5-4ae4543c4d03Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h64efd692g01f8g41afg9488g32fa8265b176Text UUID: 9b4281a8-e271-4e20-8a07-1c83cc65fb49Show Once: True
      • +
        297.Halsin: Indeed. Our time with them was... certainly bracing. Takes me back to some youthful misadventures in the Underdark.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 975f2f95-5757-e6fb-8d26-bc7ca0594a2aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hbd692f4fg9b3ag4c80ga155g9ecac1bc7cb3Text UUID: ff488754-4be1-451b-808c-5a66ce35162eTimeline Phase Index: 51Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 975f2f95-5757-e6fb-8d26-bc7ca0594a2aTimeline Phase Duration: 12.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          435.Player: I'm glad you enjoyed yourself.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e18cc241-e64f-7bde-2897-07794b31814fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2e30feddgec6dg4241ga669gffe985df4ae2Text UUID: c75be1ea-0664-4b26-b831-53a2de8547e4Show Once: True
          • +
            362.Halsin: Very much so. One positive I will concede about city life is that you never know what lies around the corner.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb5b1aab-f7a7-6326-dc2d-e7d8ade8f54dSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hb38f6803geba9g4dfdgbfe0gd39933a01a2aText UUID: 40dee7b8-a5d6-4173-851e-87673e88bfbdTimeline Phase Index: 31Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bb5b1aab-f7a7-6326-dc2d-e7d8ade8f54dTimeline Phase Duration: 9.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              146.Player: You mentioned something about the Underdark?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4b9ee19a-0018-d2f2-bda7-03bce45a6692Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8f4195a3g2dc5g4178gbdf4ga62d619b9f84Text UUID: fd946bb5-70c5-4c9a-a7ef-fe702bf7855cShow Once: True
              • •
                454.Jump to Node 321

                Metadata

                Node Type: JumpUUID: f15cdae1-d110-5449-aa5e-9f787b3505bfJump Target: Node 321 (a4c22f25-059a-832b-92ca-cd8afb045d0f)Jump Target Point: 2
            • •
              57.Jump to Node 282

              Metadata

              Node Type: JumpUUID: 1e69b9d3-32c5-6156-fada-f674841930f6Jump Target: Node 282 (910c8598-8b03-2f7c-739c-62b54c397be1)Jump Target Point: 1
        • +
          372.Player: I was concerned the City Watch might burst in on us, with the sounds we made.!WYR_DapperDrow_Event_IntimacyWithBearHalsin

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • WYR_DapperDrow_Event_IntimacyWithBearHalsin {cd677834-61eb-48b7-acf3-0a58b9e1ef67} = False

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c1448820-f493-16bd-0efa-8e85c2aa6502Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha504b197g3050g4f9ega0dagabc740145a26Text UUID: b99df66e-6ae2-4981-8bcd-c4041a999723Show Once: True
          • +
            137.Halsin: I am sure they are well used to it. Cramped streets and thin walls make for people adept at ignoring things. You could find yourself more alone in a city than in the deepest woods.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4861a63a-2318-5bc8-73b8-e61b90ae260dSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h1681cfdfgdc0ag4fd4ga016gd9d01c7665bdText UUID: 895807f9-f9e9-40fa-9760-aba87d39f1fdTimeline Phase Index: 180Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4861a63a-2318-5bc8-73b8-e61b90ae260dTimeline Phase Duration: 14.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •
              307.Jump to Node 362

              Metadata

              Node Type: JumpUUID: 9be9e20f-2b13-a7c8-6fa5-fcbf2b65e2c2Jump Target: Node 362 (bb5b1aab-f7a7-6326-dc2d-e7d8ade8f54d)Jump Target Point: 2
        • +
          387.Player: I was concerned the City Watch might burst in on us, thinking a bear was running amok, devouring flesh.WYR_DapperDrow_Event_IntimacyWithBearHalsin

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • WYR_DapperDrow_Event_IntimacyWithBearHalsin {cd677834-61eb-48b7-acf3-0a58b9e1ef67} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c913e365-00eb-0266-5fbf-08499c682ec3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf52d0449g002bg4d94gae19g3891b11af361Text UUID: c5797007-144c-42b2-8026-7e9d786306c9Show Once: True
          • +
            199.Halsin: Well, in a sense, there was. But no harm done. In fact, one of the drow looked like he was going to pay us towards the end.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6249f502-807c-67f3-f1f8-99e6e683ecf1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7021b9d7g949fg463bg94ddg2b721cc655ecText UUID: c09ccb60-eb42-42c5-a5e4-5747c7d94691Timeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6249f502-807c-67f3-f1f8-99e6e683ecf1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • See Node 307 Jump to Node 362
        • +
          321.Player: You mentioned the Underdark before - come on, tell me about it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a4c22f25-059a-832b-92ca-cd8afb045d0fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdf342c22gff58g4321gb48fg93d25c5b5dd3Text UUID: 76196308-ddf3-408c-8606-b62272034beaShow Once: True
          • +
            49.Halsin: It was a long time ago. I was a foolhardy young druid, intent on seeing the beauty of nature's unworldly fauna and subterranean glow for myself...

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1b8cf8f4-2bfb-d0d7-69b8-722127c59c2bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf128f692g6755g4a09g90feg374a47616600Text UUID: 72fbc025-d97c-4c77-917b-1b5b7a723192Timeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1b8cf8f4-2bfb-d0d7-69b8-722127c59c2bTimeline Phase Duration: 26.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 1b8cf8f4-2bfb-d0d7-69b8-722127c59c2bGroup Index: 0
            • +
              151.Halsin: Certain... events transpired, and I found myself a guest of a noble drow house for a time. Well, something between guest, prisoner, and consort, perhaps.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4de13630-4bff-42a3-84d3-cef36b4c9493Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h56163aacged58g481bg8984gd60f6dcd9542Text UUID: 1e34b6b7-a048-4d25-a778-480ed0725e3eGroup ID: 1b8cf8f4-2bfb-d0d7-69b8-722127c59c2bGroup Index: 1
              • +
                383.Player: Consort?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c6c9bda3-cdc7-f1d5-e2e8-cb2dd78f6f61Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbf8562f6gc537g45b0g85c5gbdd63b389554Text UUID: 7433438d-ea4d-4d40-8b00-1a1bb5d591eaShow Once: True
                • +
                  463.Halsin: The house matron took an interest in me, and the patron also... They saw me as a novelty, perhaps. I was chained in their bedchamber for nigh on three years.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f8085ea7-b27f-b936-60c8-82dacb779ac6Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h5370920bg5588g4659g995ag24a36a2f57eeText UUID: 8bc2d0f1-ba29-4973-a231-fa063202c73bTimeline Phase Index: 66Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f8085ea7-b27f-b936-60c8-82dacb779ac6Timeline Phase Duration: 13.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • +
                    115.Player: Three years? That's awful.!Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplainedHalsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained {e8133ee8-3a54-0c0d-e9e1-d2abf452bec6} = False
                    settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained {e8133ee8-3a54-0c0d-e9e1-d2abf452bec6} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3db78c70-f6e1-c6d3-d957-69c155ac4e34Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7a6eb8f1gd356g432fgb2a0g8b1d37c03ab3Text UUID: 2dd23bcf-fda0-43ba-a3c5-7602a5a460f0Show Once: True
                    • +
                      158.Halsin: It was not ideal... but not without its positives either. I did what was necessary to survive. And perhaps a few things that were less than necessary.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 512a63fc-4bd1-fd96-95b8-3fe4c5609c24Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h947a8de7gcce5g4286g98e3g477e329bbb3eText UUID: a70677f3-a372-47b8-97bd-c9ef106d6217Timeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 512a63fc-4bd1-fd96-95b8-3fe4c5609c24Timeline Phase Duration: 12.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • +
                        117.Halsin: Don't misunderstand me - I feared for my life, and wanted my freedom back, but I was willing to wait for my moment, and eventually it came.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hab49d19bge897g4593g9360g23a9467c3ef7Text UUID: 41d28230-0881-4407-b887-5f678f128c36Timeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Timeline Phase Duration: 43.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Group Index: 0
                        • +
                          392.Halsin: Lolth's noble houses are constantly at each other's throats, and eventually, some rivals of my hosts sought to unseat them.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ca681164-103f-3487-f055-9b1a14ebbb44Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf734a0f0g13d8g476agb291g57f91b372c47Text UUID: dced2fe9-a971-425c-9bb6-fa36e3ce426aGroup ID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Group Index: 1
                          • +
                            44.Halsin: It was chaos - drow against drow, the clash of blades echoing throughout caverns, the feel of warm blood that I could not see...

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a64fec7-12cf-75c8-616f-53210ea1e947Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3d527cbfg4280g43fagb30dgb520a002745aText UUID: faef4886-d74d-41d1-814d-76a07d339bbdGroup ID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Group Index: 2
                            • +
                              173.Halsin: ...I took my chance and fled while all were distracted. I never looked back until I breathed fresh air again, and never learned what came of my hosts.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 578f8cac-47f6-0546-68ae-83d27e90a9f2Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8f94b72cgef8bg45f3g9364g1813f1ab7025Text UUID: d8ba7574-e59c-4f47-af12-1aa058c7367dGroup ID: 3eca1499-504f-ed47-3452-351534888ed0Group Index: 3
                              • •

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: JumpUUID: f8ad246d-f0aa-1f71-76bf-a24895d5eb55Jump Target: Node 463 (f8085ea7-b27f-b936-60c8-82dacb779ac6)Jump Target Point: 2
                              • •
                                354.Jump to Node 273

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: JumpUUID: b5b8eec4-7ddf-1f14-0192-b11c75268a4bJump Target: Node 273 (8daf3f62-cfe2-b716-c35b-55f03f0a3509)Jump Target Point: 1
                  • +
                    254.Player: How did you escape?!Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplainedHalsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained {e8133ee8-3a54-0c0d-e9e1-d2abf452bec6} = False
                    settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained {e8133ee8-3a54-0c0d-e9e1-d2abf452bec6} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 81e8e597-da3a-bc03-1fda-90b5b6d148caSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha27082e8g916bg4917g9c51g1ef11b1fb50cText UUID: 15511c94-e255-4b8f-9dc4-2da59ae86c34Show Once: True
                    • +
                      42.Halsin: I waited for my chance, and did what was necessary to survive. And perhaps a few things that were less than necessary.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 17b25fff-0d6c-4a6f-6616-9f770f37f870Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hedb6ad59g6f4fg45acg898cg1923276b57a4Text UUID: 8d329c15-529d-499b-897c-eb61deb17c0aTimeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 17b25fff-0d6c-4a6f-6616-9f770f37f870Timeline Phase Duration: 10.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • See Node 117 (Halsin) Don't misunderstand me - I feared for my life, and wanted my freedom back, but I was willing to wait for my moment, and eventually it came.
                  • +
                    324.Player: Sounds traumatic. You may need to reflect on that.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a606215a-010a-03cf-dc3a-0a51a810dc84Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h309b5234g89ceg4cc1g9377gc146f2f553ffText UUID: d9041112-e818-41bc-8f7b-9294991697ecShow Once: True
                    • +
                      22.Halsin: Time can prove to be a trickster on one's recollections - what would be multiple lifetimes for others now separate me from my captivity... perhaps I have lost perspective on what happened to me.

                      Text

                      Time can prove to be a trickster on one's recollections - what would be multiple lifetimes for others now separate me from my captivity... perhaps I have lost perspective on what happened to me.
                      h3a8591dbg30f4g4d7egb4b5g41e21b316c40 | 80688cce-c312-48cc-b177-280741344bab | stub

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0da7a140-294c-c05b-bc7d-9ed6ec3bb53aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3a8591dbg30f4g4d7egb4b5g41e21b316c40Text UUID: 80688cce-c312-48cc-b177-280741344babTimeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0da7a140-294c-c05b-bc7d-9ed6ec3bb53aTimeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        204.Player: Indeed. Confusing slavery with a fond memory is quite the shift in perspective.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6452994e-ee16-74c1-69f2-da8b3cd680d0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdc5419dbg415cg480bga05bgc8c45013a538Text UUID: fa34fce8-4731-4ec6-9833-c6d1861c558dShow Once: True
                        • +
                          475.Halsin: Apologies, I meant no offence. I survived, and in years to come, I must have allowed hardships to become dwarfed by the Shadow Curse in my mind.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fd7fc149-f580-32b4-9782-fd5dc31307a1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: he0dfd8e4gd061g4a1eg8241g2d220713eda3Text UUID: 09a41e3c-6d00-4dc8-9555-452751f89a1dTimeline Phase Index: 42Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fd7fc149-f580-32b4-9782-fd5dc31307a1Timeline Phase Duration: 24sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: fd7fc149-f580-32b4-9782-fd5dc31307a1Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            270.Halsin: I lost friends, confidantes, and had the weight of responsibility bear down on me unrelentingly. There was scant opportunity for self-reflection...

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8b504457-81e1-380f-9cd7-28dcb14369c9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h4bef5aedg246bg4ebdga177gf516b4bfb777Text UUID: 08e95713-1ebe-4721-814f-4e5ddb814104Group ID: fd7fc149-f580-32b4-9782-fd5dc31307a1Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              93.Halsin: I am lucky to have your counsel. It was sorely needed.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e945502-a147-a498-e90a-ada5824ae212Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8ea36684g4d49g402fg9b7cgf1e4c9feb7e2Text UUID: 80d0c334-dff6-4fc5-a6d4-da0be42ceaf2Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e945502-a147-a498-e90a-ada5824ae212Timeline Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                              • +
                                275.Player: So how did you escape?!Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplainedHalsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                                • Halsin_InParty_State_EscapeFromUnderdarkExplained {e8133ee8-3a54-0c0d-e9e1-d2abf452bec6} = False

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8df46270-7f70-ce83-aac9-d688d70c2cd5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7a953043g9962g451eg833cg16e8bcd229bfText UUID: f5ae574a-9e76-4603-be70-cd5ae3ac7fefShow Once: True
                                • +
                                  382.Halsin: Lolth's noble houses are constantly at each other's throats, and eventually, the house that held me fell out of favour, and was attacked.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c5fb3d7e-57b7-57c8-b0de-f6d5079e4c9fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3f7c59f7g9c5bg461fg9796g8b79f38edeb4Text UUID: c3658230-b311-4d04-a01a-15010ccb8ac6Timeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c5fb3d7e-57b7-57c8-b0de-f6d5079e4c9fTimeline Phase Duration: 33.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: c5fb3d7e-57b7-57c8-b0de-f6d5079e4c9fGroup Index: 0
                                  • +
                                    34.Halsin: It was chaos - drow against drow, the clash of blades echoing throughout caverns, the feel of warm blood that I could not see...

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 147a9cf4-4a97-2f3e-9407-3662cb4ee16fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h86df409dg9a76g4513g84e3ga51aa315931cText UUID: 8089c846-88c0-4ba5-a6c7-b60ed6b38159Group ID: c5fb3d7e-57b7-57c8-b0de-f6d5079e4c9fGroup Index: 1
                                    • +
                                      54.Halsin: ...I took my chance and fled while all were distracted. I never looked back until I breathed fresh air again, and never learned what came of my hosts.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1d618803-5ad9-5794-709d-8e5db5b9e4f5Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h08e224b5gaa28g42cdgb25dg4204161cb812Text UUID: c255efd6-4883-4326-b812-c84614ebbd24Group ID: c5fb3d7e-57b7-57c8-b0de-f6d5079e4c9fGroup Index: 2

                                        293.Jump to Node 338

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: JumpUUID: 93c1f183-e6cc-7cbb-d2ff-3e630cd6bffaJump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
                              • +
                                451.Player: Think nothing of it.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f0b67704-5f68-d9c6-4314-6bddf71775a5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5201ae57g6c8dg450bgab20g36eda5a847b4Text UUID: 22173961-5889-42cd-9bdc-3dab17b4c7d4Show Once: True
                                • •
                                  333.Halsin: No - I shall not take you for granted, nor my own past. What is the point of long life, if one does not make room for reflection?

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: abbf6987-8c9f-ba2b-18b1-63f4cfde918cSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf0b5b2c4g9184g4e12ga309gf56a98e09aa0Text UUID: 5d37863c-967c-41e1-b5db-33e382893be5Timeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: abbf6987-8c9f-ba2b-18b1-63f4cfde918cTimeline Phase Duration: 10.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • +
                                273.Player: Turn to other matters.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8daf3f62-cfe2-b716-c35b-55f03f0a3509Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h170a125age352g4a98gbbf0g63a48cc1ee80Text UUID: 13cb524e-f675-4104-bbdb-5f09524953c6Show Once: True
                                • •
                                  81.Jump to Node 338

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 28f4058b-8db2-34bd-d5b3-0d2eeac72457Jump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
                      • +
                        131.Player: It's not for me to say - I wasn't there. But I'm here now, if you wish to talk.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 45712557-ffa4-d6da-916d-4366aaa254cfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8e256057g6347g44c3g89b5g2a2c95f465f5Text UUID: 2723c7a6-bc39-4058-a8ac-974cb6c0c4edShow Once: True
                        • +
                          370.Halsin: I... have not had true confidantes for some time. The Shadow Curse robbed me of almost all my peers, and replaced them with the weight of responsibility. Perhaps that caused me to gild undeserving memories of my youth.

                          Text

                          I... have not had true confidantes for some time. The Shadow Curse robbed me of almost all my peers, and replaced them with the weight of responsibility. Perhaps that caused me to gild undeserving memories of my youth.
                          h599332bag97fbg498fg8555g0d3f5c12ba16 | 79b3307b-5dfc-4f00-8500-99f4ed835686 | stub

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bfd7d95c-8549-d183-9b39-f654397480c0Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h599332bag97fbg498fg8555g0d3f5c12ba16Text UUID: 79b3307b-5dfc-4f00-8500-99f4ed835686Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bfd7d95c-8549-d183-9b39-f654397480c0Timeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                          • •
                            425.Jump to Node 93

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: JumpUUID: db87ab33-e863-4cb9-4a15-d62dc3482a69Jump Target: Node 93 (2e945502-a147-a498-e90a-ada5824ae212)Jump Target Point: 1
                      • +
                        74.Player: You have a habit of getting captured - did you ever notice that?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 24839025-c465-31c8-88d7-89a499d24d21Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1ef48094g1817g4255gba47gaa8f7c2d489eText UUID: 2efeec78-3a24-4569-8611-c7b428a7a77aShow Once: True
                        • +
                          308.Halsin: I am aware. Perhaps I put too much faith in my skills of negotiation, or want to see good where there is none.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9d8f2d2b-6330-149e-43d2-bfca21a585c3Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8e50b3a5g67c4g498ag8a66g7f0fc429df2dText UUID: 7ba51458-d70c-4e0c-9c10-2ca3526a7ecaTimeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9d8f2d2b-6330-149e-43d2-bfca21a585c3Timeline Phase Duration: 27.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 9d8f2d2b-6330-149e-43d2-bfca21a585c3Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            393.Halsin: It would be easy to resort to nature's fury whenever something stood in my way, yet I cannot help but feel I would be sullying the Oak Father's gifts. Naive perhaps... but I still draw breath.

                            Text

                            It would be easy to resort to nature's fury whenever something stood in my way, yet I cannot help but feel I would be sullying the Oak Father's gifts. Naive perhaps... but I still draw breath.
                            h4917b44dgd712g421agba38ge9f615b54d89 | 1cd95dca-cacd-4751-b3b0-91206cc7091b | stub

                            Metadata

                              260.Jump to Node 93

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: JumpUUID: 85f048cb-6d0c-2b36-e2bf-688123fc917cJump Target: Node 93 (2e945502-a147-a498-e90a-ada5824ae212)Jump Target Point: 2
                  • +
                    198.Player: The mighty bear is an escaped pet, then. I wonder if there is a reward for your return.Lolth-Sworn

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                    • Lolth-Sworn {c71eb8de-74e3-4d70-9826-22da7e2dc607} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 62358a9b-db2f-fd4d-a700-66cb78857a2fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcfc25bc2g2932g4177gb735gd527fea05128Text UUID: bb435013-b89a-46f6-a58c-6605daa15a73Show Once: True
                    • +
                      359.Halsin: You would be unwise to attempt it, trust me. In any case, the house of my captors is long-extinct.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b94b741e-9c3f-73cc-54b3-5567884c8dd4Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h2a1ab5d8gc8a9g431bg8df2g30673ddbe3dfText UUID: de428567-44cb-416c-aa24-c50262bf680bTimeline Phase Index: 119Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b94b741e-9c3f-73cc-54b3-5567884c8dd4Timeline Phase Duration: 17.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b94b741e-9c3f-73cc-54b3-5567884c8dd4Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        80.Halsin: ... interesting. Part of me still thought of them as hosts, but I suppose captors is indeed more accurate.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 279f9ddc-51fe-7541-48cb-80671900e721Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0897c687g2b72g4dd0ga21fgb46991f961d9Text UUID: 7568e6c4-c03a-4712-bb1f-34a0feb93defGroup ID: b94b741e-9c3f-73cc-54b3-5567884c8dd4Group Index: 1
                        • •
                          76.Jump to Node 22

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: 24f4c6c1-ee45-28a6-2bf1-85e45fcb66e8Jump Target: Node 22 (0da7a140-294c-c05b-bc7d-9ed6ec3bb53a)Jump Target Point: 1
                  • +
                    222.Player: Lolth's followers are pitiless. You threaded the needle by surviving.Seldarine

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                    • Seldarine {d2d60a81-688e-4d3d-ba56-3e467cae37fc} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6d7f3c8f-50a0-fc1f-8cc8-1ff5b34a58e9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hee02f491gd410g4a50ga948ged2aa95db601Text UUID: feb8792c-ba96-47d6-a2fa-4735a3f3e9c8Show Once: True
                    • +
                      23.Halsin: Perhaps that is so. It has been so long that I may have forgotten the peril that I faced.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0dfbaa72-ea3d-542e-f78d-32c9044f490eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h27bc7de8g268dg4026gba9agf76d6bef34a4Text UUID: 6ae2f752-0e81-4ca1-826d-52b8f6c1a014Timeline Phase Index: 142Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0dfbaa72-ea3d-542e-f78d-32c9044f490eTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • •
                        142.Jump to Node 22

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: JumpUUID: 495a38db-88d7-25cd-9d4c-e23da6559209Jump Target: Node 22 (0da7a140-294c-c05b-bc7d-9ed6ec3bb53a)Jump Target Point: 1
                  • +
                    433.Player: I remember you spoke harshly about drow once. Perhaps this explains that.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: df02c8d1-0260-1b94-5a16-7973827de2c2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h11873fddg5586g46cfga6e5gd0a3a9d66a3dText UUID: 25b6f545-d20b-448b-9372-d10b0a4ba279Show Once: True
                    • +
                      154.Halsin: Indeed... perhaps I carry more resentment than I realise.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4fce0515-b63b-32ae-3be9-8b4f290af9b0Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h39b66ad3gc20bg4bb2g98a6g76a2a377b770Text UUID: bc1b9f06-2728-4abc-a49d-f368bed582d1Timeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4fce0515-b63b-32ae-3be9-8b4f290af9b0Timeline Phase Duration: 5.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • •

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: JumpUUID: 0c8a9142-43fc-9aea-8e0c-ee90c1dfde5cJump Target: Node 22 (0da7a140-294c-c05b-bc7d-9ed6ec3bb53a)Jump Target Point: 1
              • +
                18.Player: I'm surprised you survived at all.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 09d8f626-b130-0079-bc0e-3e05aba28d0dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6b309c1dg7973g42e5gb6c0g1e4bc61ac585Text UUID: 3fa14c75-ee04-4375-9f5e-a885f298bb6dShow Once: True
                • +
                  5.Halsin: It was touch-and-go for a while...

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 02835d5a-e94e-9c3e-e501-d3ef33e8dbadSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h786894dfg6e29g44adga616g7624f12e0158Text UUID: f0713894-f4b4-476d-9bb3-ba4310233a92Timeline Phase Index: 179Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 02835d5a-e94e-9c3e-e501-d3ef33e8dbadTimeline Phase Duration: 4.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • •
                    242.Jump to Node 463

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: JumpUUID: 7abdaee2-51de-82c8-397f-4f31033d768dJump Target: Node 463 (f8085ea7-b27f-b936-60c8-82dacb779ac6)Jump Target Point: 1
              • +
                36.Player: I'm not sure if this is a fond memory or a cautionary tale.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 149d7a4c-8152-0c72-3422-9f7ff4fca138Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he63eb142g2ed5g46dcg9112g8ad7ad166b30Text UUID: 7caab722-94b6-43d4-a46a-2e376265f36bShow Once: True
                • +
                  313.Halsin: The passage of time has a strange way of polishing even the most arduous of memories into precious keepsakes. Had circumstances been slightly different, I may have been put to work in mines, or killed outright.

                  Text

                  The passage of time has a strange way of polishing even the most arduous of memories into precious keepsakes. Had circumstances been slightly different, I may have been put to work in mines, or killed outright.
                  h7774a79ag81e0g4d2fg9ab9ga58e771b31a0 | 731d5dcb-ca17-4e11-84da-bc82ba2cc98d | stub

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f7d7ccd-274d-c1a1-3d43-7690d7b9a780Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7774a79ag81e0g4d2fg9ab9ga58e771b31a0Text UUID: 731d5dcb-ca17-4e11-84da-bc82ba2cc98dTimeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9f7d7ccd-274d-c1a1-3d43-7690d7b9a780Timeline Phase Duration: 15.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • See Node 242 Jump to Node 463
              • +
                67.Player: Some drow abhor surface elves. I'm surprised your pelt didn't end up decorating a banquet hall in Menzoberranzan.Drow

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                • Drow {676e854b-d74b-44f3-8363-3ef27164a54d} = True

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 20dc948a-fef5-2017-5fbf-795da649748bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3f411407g830dg4aa0gba86g65184c3e34dcText UUID: f6100f8c-8b24-4d67-9223-a66ac7364bbeShow Once: True
                • +
                  189.Halsin: A very likely outcome - in fact I saw decorations of that very type, and worse, in my time there. But my luck held.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5db0d0e0-b1c6-ac36-9fda-15556e46008bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h96ee4cdfgabb5g4d6fg94b2g9861ccdb8dd8Text UUID: 43b6efe5-b080-4b89-b1a7-397a389db780Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5db0d0e0-b1c6-ac36-9fda-15556e46008bTimeline Phase Duration: 12.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • See Node 242 Jump to Node 463
        • +
          37.Player: Misadventures in the Underdark? Come on, tell me all.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 14db96e4-ef40-0360-e889-2c55ed5e6c63Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5febc677g3c9eg4369ga6c9g7edb38d56cd5Text UUID: fe654d76-a2c2-45ae-bbe8-849104e99ba7Show Once: True
          • See Node 49 (Halsin) It was a long time ago. I was a foolhardy young druid, intent on seeing the beauty of nature's unworldly fauna and subterranean glow for myself...
        • +
          282.Player: Turn to other matters.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 910c8598-8b03-2f7c-739c-62b54c397be1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h047371e6g1e61g4d97g9f2bg540eee995845Text UUID: 1a3c55c5-81f7-447b-a426-a32feeb88bf4Show Once: True

      • +
        465.Halsin: Indeed. Thank you for inviting me. I hadn't realised you considered me a worthy accomplice in such matters. I hope you'll keep me in mind, in future.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f8ad43f3-d540-afab-4a82-714a654a44f1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h26d2efe0g6b0cg459egb367g2d8d52ef482aText UUID: b0c58d4e-67aa-4239-812b-576ee975282eTimeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f8ad43f3-d540-afab-4a82-714a654a44f1Timeline Phase Duration: 23.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: f8ad43f3-d540-afab-4a82-714a654a44f1Group Index: 0
        • +
          245.Halsin: Our time with those two drow was... certainly bracing. Takes me back to some youthful misadventures in the Underdark.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7ceca01d-c754-9035-ad9b-aa119ee753cfSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h1d0b7d19gfab8g4000ga685gbee0e5d7ea95Text UUID: 56c138af-029a-4fb2-bd5b-7c64a64aba07Group ID: f8ad43f3-d540-afab-4a82-714a654a44f1Group Index: 1

      363.Player: There are wildflowers growing by an old shack, deep in the shadow curse.!SCL_LiftingTheCurse_State_OliverFledToTownCURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A!GLO_LiftingTheCurse_Event_ToldHalsinFlowersSCL_LiftingTheCurse_Event_SpottedFlowersGLO_LiftingTheCurse_Event_ToldHalsinFlowers
