      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bbafab11-c028-53ff-0852-8ae06d723affSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: had3789dcgb07cg4a72g8f43g0009ec1b55f8Text UUID: 88d2e3c4-ff02-4e30-add0-14419d0afb51Show Once: True
      • +
        365.Halsin: Flowers in bloom where nothing else grows...? That is a sign of Thaniel's power - it must be.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be1ad7e2-8ac1-f2bb-3fa9-4cc325a10778Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h2108bd1bgb307g486ega228g570895c4676dText UUID: ec8a42a5-39f3-409c-bf66-05a126c2f9beTimeline Phase Index: 22Timeline Dialog Node UUID: be1ad7e2-8ac1-f2bb-3fa9-4cc325a10778Timeline Phase Duration: 11.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: be1ad7e2-8ac1-f2bb-3fa9-4cc325a10778Group Index: 0
        • •
          315.Halsin: The missing part of him must be near there. We need to search that area.HAV_LiftingTheCurse_Event_AddOliversHouseToMap

          Flags and Tags

          settype Global
          • HAV_LiftingTheCurse_Event_AddOliversHouseToMap {dff3b91b-d749-41f7-a6d6-2a3038aa8ee7} = True

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a037ef2d-8da1-bd93-2e84-927fbe2f63eeSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hb14fe39ege71dg4528g8ab1g5176c2ca03adText UUID: 84880b8c-0869-490e-8e69-735cb98ca270Group ID: be1ad7e2-8ac1-f2bb-3fa9-4cc325a10778Group Index: 1
    • +
      159.Player: You said Thaniel is missing part of himself - any ideas how we can find it?!HAV_LiftingTheCurse_Event_AddOliversHouseToMapGLO_LiftingtheCurse_State_ThanielReleased!GLO_LiftingTheCurse_State_BreathHasBeenRestored

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 51300769-6d53-3103-d20e-2b523871ff94Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h04a1d06cg47fcg4be5ga46fgb108bf92844eText UUID: e95d58fe-479c-46ec-b740-6a320ac2329fShow Once: True
      • +
        285.Halsin: No matter how it's been twisted by the shadows, it is still part of Thaniel's essence - it will resemble him somehow, and may show signs of his power.SCL_ShadowCurse_Knows_Oliver_Is_Thaniel

        Flags and Tags

        settype Global
        • SCL_ShadowCurse_Knows_Oliver_Is_Thaniel {56af8bbd-eafe-3861-22a2-c253f16952e2} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91c05fe8-51a6-4112-54e4-b0d89386ea5eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3b7c7642g6f4cg470fg88d6g55626b17d9f2Text UUID: 74d69373-315a-4e94-b65d-85da12cd434bTimeline Phase Index: 45Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 91c05fe8-51a6-4112-54e4-b0d89386ea5eTimeline Phase Duration: 12.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          356.Halsin: Look for signs of life in the darkness. Wildflowers, where everything else is dead. The curse cannot subdue the power Thaniel bears. Not entirely.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b684ede6-9308-5d6f-7a07-fda80521fe66Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7f37c39bg2ca3g4b73g942fgc04f0719c881Text UUID: 70e68a9d-2ec9-4a67-86f3-3b748c545665Timeline Phase Index: 167Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b684ede6-9308-5d6f-7a07-fda80521fe66Timeline Phase Duration: 36.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b684ede6-9308-5d6f-7a07-fda80521fe66Group Index: 0
          • +
            207.Halsin: In fact, I think I saw just the sort before, not long after we first came within reach of the shadow curse. Fool that I am, I did not grasp their significance at the time.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 659d40ae-26cb-9c3f-a66d-f2b0b829c4c1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h974fb43dg79dbg4e15gbd8ag7beffc9f6926Text UUID: db148ed6-c98d-44b6-a1ab-1fe7d0ff43d7Group ID: b684ede6-9308-5d6f-7a07-fda80521fe66Group Index: 1
            • +
              385.Halsin: There is a ruin, some way outside of Last Light. I caught a glimpse of fresh blooms there, but did not investigate further. I shall mark it upon your map.HAV_LiftingTheCurse_Event_AddOliversHouseToMap

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • HAV_LiftingTheCurse_Event_AddOliversHouseToMap {dff3b91b-d749-41f7-a6d6-2a3038aa8ee7} = True

      234.Player: I met a peer of yours - the druid Jaheira. Do you know her?CURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A!ORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutJaheira!ORI_Jaheira_State_IsInPartyHAV_EnteringHaven_State_JaheiraMetORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutJaheira

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 747c77f3-110a-0eb2-c66c-a0bdeb70afe4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h36287eecgdb22g4f16g9349g7e4d9f0ef06fText UUID: 167153bb-3a45-40da-adc7-464929933d1cShow Once: True
      • +
        71.Halsin: Only by reputation. She was present when we marched against Ketheric Thorm, but on the far end of the battle lines from where I fought.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 21eb609c-44ac-c2dd-cff2-11f4f12575adSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h80aca196g1409g47d4gab95gf764b37a8137Text UUID: eb8c41be-c4b5-4a41-8541-ed0e7bbe844cTimeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 21eb609c-44ac-c2dd-cff2-11f4f12575adTimeline Phase Duration: 34.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 21eb609c-44ac-c2dd-cff2-11f4f12575adGroup Index: 0
        • +
          152.Halsin: And in the chaos that ensued, well... our forces were scattered. I led some to safety, but never learned of her fate. I'm glad to hear she survived.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ed65ff1-62c1-f00f-cd9e-efbbaa024e89Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h706538d2g9f44g4b30g934cg682beb1e0c6aText UUID: 49d66e83-6c88-40cc-8427-7cfd804a2a67Group ID: 21eb609c-44ac-c2dd-cff2-11f4f12575adGroup Index: 1
          • +
            267.Halsin: Though in truth, I should not be surprised - she was always said to be formidable - and cunning. I could have learned much from her, no doubt.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 890c4182-31fa-af83-285c-62d2c56f5452Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h0deda2f1gfc80g431agb914g5ea88ea94ac4Text UUID: bd464cd0-0e09-445d-8b03-7916efe8ac09Group ID: 21eb609c-44ac-c2dd-cff2-11f4f12575adGroup Index: 2
            • +
              227.Player: You're an Archdruid - what could you possibly have left to learn from anyone?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 708b3f42-ebc8-1e64-2517-fafb4c211892Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h75ea08cagd56cg4d80gbd8fg3c6794865ab4Text UUID: 426e93bd-17ce-4c7d-b635-8d59e5b02274Show Once: True
              • +
                90.Halsin: No matter how long I live, I will always strive to remain a keen pupil. Only a fool would think he could drink in all knowledge until none is left. There is always more - nature's tapestry is infinitely complex.

                Text

                No matter how long I live, I will always strive to remain a keen pupil. Only a fool would think he could drink in all knowledge until none is left. There is always more - nature's tapestry is infinitely complex.
                h7fb65ae6gf93eg47acgb610g7bbc4912bf10 | a25ca39c-91cb-4e07-8413-ee8025064371 | stub

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ce0b172-4963-eebf-2426-279eca1e82a5Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7fb65ae6gf93eg47acgb610g7bbc4912bf10Text UUID: a25ca39c-91cb-4e07-8413-ee8025064371Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2ce0b172-4963-eebf-2426-279eca1e82a5Timeline Phase Duration: 15.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • •

            • +

              • +
                228.Halsin: There is much to admire, judging by the stories.

                • +
                  303.Halsin: I cannot help but wonder how she would have handled some of the challenges I faced as Archdruid. Defended the grove? Kagha? The Shadow Druids?DEN_ShadowDruid_Event_StartDenouncingScene!DEN_Lockdown_State_Active

                  • +
                    85.Halsin: At least now we can benefit from her presence, and perhaps work to a common goal.

      472.Player: You've spent all these years fighting the shadow curse - what happens once it's lifted?CURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • CURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A {f76b85b5-b557-4409-98fd-cc7b22f8292b} = True

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fb320a29-2557-be12-eff3-670d8eb85a5fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7f41e52ag5f39g449agb33dgff014b4686d0Text UUID: 2336b6d7-6201-47ff-9288-85eadf839bc6Show Once: True
      • +
        79.Halsin: Honestly, I never thought I'd make it that far. But the Absolute is a threat to all, and I promised I'd help you with your parasite.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2655c31c-1bb7-9de8-92ad-40b4d38b075aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hc2d2169fgb769g4c1bga4a5ge09f7d8f342eText UUID: d7944b41-38c2-4aba-bf5e-0c53e41dbc45Timeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2655c31c-1bb7-9de8-92ad-40b4d38b075aTimeline Phase Duration: 15.74sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 2655c31c-1bb7-9de8-92ad-40b4d38b075aGroup Index: 0
        • +
          219.Halsin: So, I'll remain with you - if you'll have me, that is.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c5ad002-a330-9414-a33b-c8a3180993b7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h246c1aa0gc1b5g45cdga162g4cc0114e6f6aText UUID: 209b54ca-2808-4248-a1cd-52cd8c396249Group ID: 2655c31c-1bb7-9de8-92ad-40b4d38b075aGroup Index: 1
          • +
            466.Player: Of course. I only wish you'd joined me earlier.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f90ad988-7084-b922-506c-582763aee250Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3378608bg9485g450cg9cdcgb6aab60b17e9Text UUID: c2bc3624-4182-4fe5-baa5-ee4da3272e4eShow Once: True
            • +
              277.Halsin: So do I. But one duty at a time.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ee0565e-c16e-4c97-96bb-4bac9663db20Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h4c1d5fbbgb2f3g42d7g91eegdd3d05cd9085Text UUID: 807593b7-baab-4e13-b6e8-ac173bbeb275Timeline Phase Index: 44Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8ee0565e-c16e-4c97-96bb-4bac9663db20Timeline Phase Duration: 3.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID

              200.Halsin: Hmm, well, I can only hope I don't disappoint.

            139.Player: On that note, I need you to stay at camp for now.

      255.Player: Have you received any word from the grove since the Rite of Thorns?!ORI_Halsin_State_LockedGroveFollowUpDEN_Lockdown_State_ActiveORI_Halsin_State_LockedGroveFollowUp

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 833ab327-a06a-b43c-395d-09f5e6bd893eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8bf768a7g7efbg4edagbb49gc76e56284296Text UUID: 6826c6c6-c388-4dd5-929a-d26ae405f981Show Once: True
      • +
        286.Halsin: None - the grove has cut itself off from the world, to jealously guard its own little pocket of nature. No one shall ever enter or leave again.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91daf8ee-7f32-0169-5166-533a1368e84cSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h482f7f05g708fg4761gba1agabf8174512ccText UUID: 20c30008-213f-4402-bc40-32901f39279cTimeline Phase Index: 200Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 91daf8ee-7f32-0169-5166-533a1368e84cTimeline Phase Duration: 34.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 91daf8ee-7f32-0169-5166-533a1368e84cGroup Index: 0
        • +
          118.Halsin: And I have been evicted from the very place I was charged to safeguard. A telling summary of my time as Archdruid, perhaps...

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3ed7be9f-894a-1f50-0ecf-5507d82ed299Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf7663602g0366g4baag8431gc5854901cbddText UUID: f5bb93c9-1778-4a97-bd81-d3f4873f5ff2Group ID: 91daf8ee-7f32-0169-5166-533a1368e84cGroup Index: 1
          • •
            397.Halsin: Still, perhaps I can yet serve nature in another way, once our journey has ended. I can only pray that the Oak Father grants me new purpose.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cd2c0cf2-1bb2-2ba0-3935-70f4bae1a13bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h4e8bb6c5ge78fg41fagadc4g2c6af6e7a704Text UUID: 75d21e98-527e-4a55-a501-5fb811a1d0b4Group ID: 91daf8ee-7f32-0169-5166-533a1368e84cGroup Index: 2
    • +
      331.Player: How am I holding up in your estimations?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ab340966-e671-0678-9662-3944b9a2bd60Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: haf5fec0dg4857g424ag8c87gda7f7081100eText UUID: 0a4f0003-633d-46cd-af53-e8c109dce9c1Show Once: True
      • +
        192.Halsin: I've been unfair to you - I've had unrealistic expectations of your character ever since I joined you...Approval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin
        • Approval_AtLeast_10_For_Sp2 {fccac36f-92a5-ad84-9e45-fed71d386452} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f237b36-4894-b29c-8a1a-213704880aa9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha267ce31g3775g4931gaeb5g684117ff7b29Text UUID: d63c6041-a5c6-4c4e-84ae-d1371caa4db5Timeline Phase Index: 162Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f237b36-4894-b29c-8a1a-213704880aa9Timeline Phase Duration: 14.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5f237b36-4894-b29c-8a1a-213704880aa9Group Index: 0
        • •
          412.Halsin: ...but honestly? You've surpassed even those. Seems my faith was more than well-founded.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5ce84da-2bc7-79d4-1c6c-63e82fd968b6Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7709a439gbdf0g4b29g9b8fg2488275d9830Text UUID: 423197f1-a0cd-41f1-9240-1ec209e983bdGroup ID: 5f237b36-4894-b29c-8a1a-213704880aa9Group Index: 1
      • •
        82.Halsin: Given the circumstances? You're faring as well as can be expected, I suppose.Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin
        • Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2 {c90a1ed4-c142-3300-65d0-0a0a4d6e08f7} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 296e58e6-7ddc-d6af-9548-dcf458556592Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd62a772ag9deeg4c25gb80bgf2f0548e9b30Text UUID: 6ceef877-4178-43e5-a746-703cb78c17f6Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 296e58e6-7ddc-d6af-9548-dcf458556592Timeline Phase Duration: 6.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • •
        381.Halsin: Honestly...? I'd hoped for more from you. But perhaps things can yet be turned around.!Approval_AtLeast_0_For_Sp2

        300.Halsin: Don't worry yourself about what I think just yet - we may not have spent much time in each other's company yet, but I joined you because your judgement seems sound.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 984686c8-6466-5d74-bfb7-b4d32ca85541Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7c6161d7g4b75g4757g9fa5g687c7d40a0a7Text UUID: 87e1aede-c77c-478b-9f83-ae0c3c61db9fTimeline Phase Index: 58Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 984686c8-6466-5d74-bfb7-b4d32ca85541Timeline Phase Duration: 11.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      470.Player: I feel like I haven't gotten to know you properly yet.!VISITEDREGION_CTY_Main_A!ORI_Halsin_Event_GotToKnowHalsinProperly!ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsin!ORI_State_PartneredWithHalsinSecondary

        213.Halsin: It's true, and I can't imagine I helped with that. Sometimes I let the task at hand consume me, and people think I'm obsessed. !Halsin_InParty_Event_SoughtPersonalInfoCURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A

              29.Halsin: I am?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 11a2c2de-e7fd-f4e1-f974-38cedbb16fb4Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h17e3d4c4ga217g4db8g8214g7a1c8f87b15fText UUID: 54a59e49-a9cc-4539-a2e9-794b4080d264Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 11a2c2de-e7fd-f4e1-f974-38cedbb16fb4Timeline Phase Duration: 9.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 11a2c2de-e7fd-f4e1-f974-38cedbb16fb4Group Index: 0
              • +
                194.Halsin: Trust me, it's been said. You've shown more restraint than most in avoiding the subject until now.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 610ef4a7-29e7-e41e-098c-2f13b5c28d50Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hc37f5b16g2700g425egb998g57dde1d19cd0Text UUID: 66db71f9-d0d8-4aef-b7c3-a777734c0362Group ID: 11a2c2de-e7fd-f4e1-f974-38cedbb16fb4Group Index: 1
                • +
                  416.Player: Any idea how that came about?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d88d49d1-1a92-f10c-518e-fb4e07bec59fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbf2e73c2geed5g4238gb110gc9a1ac823449Text UUID: 8d4fb612-fa23-4a1b-8626-9ec9167a3d57Show Once: True
                  • +
                    132.Halsin: Who is to say? Perhaps there's a half-orc buried somewhere in my ancestry?

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45b40c3a-e855-abf0-3b29-d78098482376Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hdaad4a3eg1c9bg4f5cga967g11377c3c6b29Text UUID: 91bee536-8560-4e9c-8eac-b695a26a38d6Timeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45b40c3a-e855-abf0-3b29-d78098482376Timeline Phase Duration: 6.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • +
                      178.Halsin: Or perhaps not - sometimes I think conventional wisdom is too narrow about what someone can or cannot be. Stranger things have most certainly happened.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 598b73d6-fbb1-e7a5-c2a7-4ef4adb4c296Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7bff5a21ge310g4c61gbb0dg8654514c9d39Text UUID: 381c125a-8fd3-4322-9204-24b9e91b3550Timeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 598b73d6-fbb1-e7a5-c2a7-4ef4adb4c296Timeline Phase Duration: 11.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                • +
                  386.Player: We don't have to talk about it, if you don't want to.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c8e2c77e-74fb-87a5-ec16-35882053f347Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb121023dg46e1g4831g8c8bgadcb712956ebText UUID: b5b25037-a592-471a-82a9-52d85b7ceb41Show Once: True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 88cf09b1-22a7-df7d-e43e-33c37ddb100aSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf4c03255gcfd8g413ag8a27g5c0e3d839f80Text UUID: 3c2cda78-325c-4b1b-a576-2581d48d307aTimeline Phase Index: 41Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 88cf09b1-22a7-df7d-e43e-33c37ddb100aTimeline Phase Duration: 8.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

            376.Player: How did you come to be a druid?!ORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutBecomingDruidORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutBecomingDruid

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutBecomingDruid {e0daf50b-bf8c-49cc-9b62-22c39887ac22} = False
            settype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_Halsin_Event_AskedAboutBecomingDruid {e0daf50b-bf8c-49cc-9b62-22c39887ac22} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c3a22547-d47e-06b4-1f26-d1a7a23495c1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hed8e5973g4c63g4894g9234ga13f058207c3Text UUID: e7fd214d-f746-4cd0-ba8d-858bb1a38065Show Once: True
            • +
              149.Halsin: I had a friend when I was young, long ago. He played with me in the forests where I grew up... but eventually, I realised no one else had heard of him.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4d623382-7ef2-2946-ece3-84d1a908dbb8Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h537ab33eg33bbg405egbc5fge2899916ae87Text UUID: a96ad789-1c07-42dc-b625-872082bc9bc0Timeline Phase Index: 187Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4d623382-7ef2-2946-ece3-84d1a908dbb8Timeline Phase Duration: 32sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 4d623382-7ef2-2946-ece3-84d1a908dbb8Group Index: 0
              • +
                450.Halsin: It was Thaniel, of course. Nature was my very first friend. I get older, but he hasn't changed a day.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee361c12-104a-22d1-caf5-cb9ea1a2df90Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h719b56abg3e8cg4168g957bg74409bc2d7caText UUID: 1644e1f7-67f0-426f-8bcd-dc78445ac56dGroup ID: 4d623382-7ef2-2946-ece3-84d1a908dbb8Group Index: 1
                • •
                  268.Halsin: I knew then that I had to be more than a companion to him. I had to be a protector.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8a5992a8-5667-d6ac-631f-3a541383bcf6Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h01652d7cg500eg4d95g93ddgc4d430deaa97Text UUID: 45a95655-a153-407f-887f-d2c6036e9992Group ID: 4d623382-7ef2-2946-ece3-84d1a908dbb8Group Index: 2
          • +
            423.Player: Do you have people out there somewhere? Family? Friends? A lover, perhaps?!Halsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamily

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
            • Halsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamily {747a5458-3893-4462-8f64-db9e225f882c} = False

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: db271c41-c8fe-1dc0-5653-0d65a8614ff0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2b0fd9eag6d58g4b35g91a7g5046fb13e619Text UUID: e97ac0c4-a805-434f-aab8-f3c4c0450567Show Once: True
            • +
              449.Halsin: You're not a doppelganger, are you? Trying to study me, learn all my secrets so you can take my place?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed772ec3-a6c9-5791-b3f4-b5a012de3d75Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h4db8e01fgf257g43a6g9067g97bfdeb2dd8bText UUID: 8230bfd8-285b-43e4-a143-fc2e9956e27cTimeline Phase Index: 24Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ed772ec3-a6c9-5791-b3f4-b5a012de3d75Timeline Phase Duration: 27.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: ed772ec3-a6c9-5791-b3f4-b5a012de3d75Group Index: 0
              • +
                327.Halsin: Save for me, my line perished a long time ago. They rest in High Forest now, near the shade of the Grandfather Tree. The grove became my family, with Silvanus as my teacher. And now, I have you.

                Text

                Save for me, my line perished a long time ago. They rest in High Forest now, near the shade of the Grandfather Tree. The grove became my family, with Silvanus as my teacher. And now, I have you.
                hafa884ddg1aa2g448dga9edg9ff4fb740584 | 49f0673e-ae05-4cc4-8a7e-eeb7ac8f7f45 | stub

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a92298d6-5179-7493-7c6e-6a9659d56fd1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hafa884ddg1aa2g448dga9edg9ff4fb740584Text UUID: 49f0673e-ae05-4cc4-8a7e-eeb7ac8f7f45Group ID: ed772ec3-a6c9-5791-b3f4-b5a012de3d75Group Index: 1
                • +
                  147.Player: I'm sorry for your loss.!Halsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamilyHalsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamily

                  • •
                    13.Halsin: It was a long time ago. The wounds don't heal, but they become more bearable.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0842e9dd-b884-7ce9-b904-85387034d12fSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h97a087d3g9c9bg4368ga2bbgcd116bd6f5c0Text UUID: edd76533-e95c-4fd4-882e-f84c1c712264Timeline Phase Index: 136Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0842e9dd-b884-7ce9-b904-85387034d12fTimeline Phase Duration: 6.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                • +
                  312.Player: You're better off with me anyway.!Halsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamilyHalsin_InParty_Event_CommentedOnDeadFamily

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9f71b334-0df3-21a4-c58b-cfb69fe4b1f4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbc03f158g6bb2g4cffga29cgf20c1f04ab82Text UUID: d9ed4a50-99e4-4dd2-a46c-cd1b90cd7126Show Once: True
                  • •
                    417.Halsin: I hope so. But I won't turn my back on the past - it made me who am I today.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d8a8f194-17f4-1f9c-4dc8-2075e63258ebSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha3f10694ga4c7g4806g8d6agb7c6453b68a7Text UUID: 7d7aa8f7-4b19-4bbf-ab40-d1d4cb20c34cTimeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d8a8f194-17f4-1f9c-4dc8-2075e63258ebTimeline Phase Duration: 6.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  88.Player: You didn't answer the part about lovers.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2c58c43e-6c2c-3b83-3d8a-adfb850cbf35Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3162e632g97c4g4f06g9155gc7bdd54d37a7Text UUID: b29e8fa3-81e3-40aa-b632-1e9408080286Show Once: True
                  • +
                    456.Halsin: I'm 350 years old. Of course there have been lovers. Just because I love nature doesn't mean I'm betrothed to it. Though sometimes, nature needs reminding...Halsin_InParty_Even_ToldPlayerHisAgeHalsin_InParty_Event_LearnedAboutLovers

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_Even_ToldPlayerHisAge {d7bf2e99-1715-0dba-3116-549a869a4202} = True
                    • Halsin_InParty_Event_LearnedAboutLovers {411fd834-ecca-8b61-fb3b-a0926f5e5031} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f254d003-dedc-041d-03a7-eb8afcc30744Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h88e57104g82d7g4a45g8124g27cb94ea9132Text UUID: c6de6709-0bf1-4053-95f3-59810fc4ac7fTimeline Phase Index: 62Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f254d003-dedc-041d-03a7-eb8afcc30744Timeline Phase Duration: 13.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                    • +
                      444.Player: Don't leave me hanging - is there someone in your life right now?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ebde302c-23ed-06ba-445d-519f61308b6bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h32f27757gd20bg41c6gba12gb4e6c9779abeText UUID: e792e029-a04b-4670-a31e-5090bc58c0beShow Once: True
                      • •
                        201.Halsin: Right now? I bed down alone, I'm afraid. Perhaps once I talk less of curses and parasites, my fortunes will improve.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 62d163ea-0194-3d6b-a94a-58499570b5bbSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h764ae40bg78ecg4db2g9a78g7b0670e6e643Text UUID: e934a3e6-6c89-4d80-ac52-95b73d7d706cTimeline Phase Index: 165Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 62d163ea-0194-3d6b-a94a-58499570b5bbTimeline Phase Duration: 11.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • +
                      328.Player: Hold on - nature needs reminding of what exactly?Halsin_InParty_Event_PlayerLearnedOfSheBear

                      Flags and Tags

                      settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                      • Halsin_InParty_Event_PlayerLearnedOfSheBear {b3fea015-bb33-e14e-ec44-67eb6292256e} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aabd1507-6881-dbdc-d7bd-469a953d15e7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he27cfe73g45c3g4842g8168gfb29726ab59dText UUID: 9e20e51b-6f78-458b-8cec-c8d2ef8c8a90Show Once: True
                      • •
                        389.Halsin: Well, I didn't pick this scar up in battle. I was in wildshape, only I forgot it was the season when bears are particularly social. A she-bear claimed me as her own - and did not appreciate being spurned.

                        Text

                        Well, I didn't pick this scar up in battle. I was in wildshape, only I forgot it was the season when bears are particularly social. A she-bear claimed me as her own - and did not appreciate being spurned.
                        hb5169fceg5e3cg4422gabbag767f865b6fad | f8dfe10d-597d-4281-a2e2-5031cacfc552 | stub

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c96a1fa1-c033-c0c5-a20a-d43c2c906df8Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hb5169fceg5e3cg4422gabbag767f865b6fadText UUID: f8dfe10d-597d-4281-a2e2-5031cacfc552Timeline Phase Index: 86Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c96a1fa1-c033-c0c5-a20a-d43c2c906df8Timeline Phase Duration: 20.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • +

              19.Halsin: Hmm, I suppose you wouldn't be shocked to learn I love animals and nature?

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0b64d648-1d3c-314f-7c60-69fdcb5441ebSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hfb3db03eg04c6g4e61g9969g336383bdc86eText UUID: 943bda00-7cb7-42cb-9f42-10732d792a1dTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0b64d648-1d3c-314f-7c60-69fdcb5441ebTimeline Phase Duration: 24.06sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 0b64d648-1d3c-314f-7c60-69fdcb5441ebGroup Index: 0
              • +
                299.Halsin: I know, I know; well-trodden territory. Well, let's see... I whittle in my spare time, and I've something of a sweet tooth - though everyone's very amused when I say I like honey.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 97ca41bb-f13d-c501-0699-7f4516b26fefSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hc38c11d9g9ec7g4421ga614g19320f86a4beText UUID: 5e5fc90c-08e3-41ec-9670-fa821f899773Group ID: 0b64d648-1d3c-314f-7c60-69fdcb5441ebGroup Index: 1
                • +
                  336.Player: Whittling? What do you make?!Halsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittlingHalsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittling

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittling {9a2ca083-a0ac-89a1-8f19-d970097acb0d} = False
                  settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittling {9a2ca083-a0ac-89a1-8f19-d970097acb0d} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ad4dfaa2-ee69-f887-385e-3b9d86606567Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf70dd11ega3dcg40a7g84a2gf53f081b5ac0Text UUID: 9227fef2-4d90-4755-ad26-263c827ecff8Show Once: True
                  • •
                    68.Halsin: Ornaments, utensils - and ducks. I like ducks.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2133a327-1954-b523-486a-f87149bda063Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h5f629252g65d4g4271g960eg6a7c371a4b3eText UUID: 77647c83-13f9-42fb-902d-492a2e577a06Timeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2133a327-1954-b523-486a-f87149bda063Timeline Phase Duration: 6.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                • +
                  325.Player: So you turn into a bear and you like honey? A little on the nose.!Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledgedHalsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged {f5ada752-b48b-19bb-bc76-c5cc901c5168} = False
                  settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged {f5ada752-b48b-19bb-bc76-c5cc901c5168} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a63565d1-8ea8-fbb7-d096-8bb1428098fcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd9ace07dg98bag43b6gacb9g113b158ee8e9Text UUID: 79e702ce-42b1-4a0b-8447-5a2c43adaf48Show Once: True
                  • •
                    14.Halsin: I like what I like. Once you get to my age, you realise there's little point in denying yourself, so long as others aren't affected.Halsin_InParty_Event_AgeSubjectRaised

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_Event_AgeSubjectRaised {5d691341-cb02-7fa3-59bd-70a8a36532fa} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0850abed-8c95-6b78-9b64-db4a42254039Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7ba08b3egbd61g4f84gb478gd06c99d29f35Text UUID: cb998349-e14f-4f92-af89-ca1d17df1e83Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0850abed-8c95-6b78-9b64-db4a42254039Timeline Phase Duration: 9.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  302.Player: You're fortunate to know what you like. I wouldn't pay any attention to what others think.!Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledgedHalsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged {f5ada752-b48b-19bb-bc76-c5cc901c5168} = False
                  settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                  • Halsin_InParty_Event_HoneyMentionAcknowledged {f5ada752-b48b-19bb-bc76-c5cc901c5168} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 98859451-a415-c51e-026d-7ffb8cf7af0cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf773056egdcaag434dga6acg7010f1e27cdaText UUID: 846861dc-637c-4572-9fff-81382ce162cdShow Once: True
                  • •
                    462.Halsin: You're right. Sometimes I think people look at me and imagine my feelings can't be hurt.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7d27189-9491-3758-0e99-03471823e0b1Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: haee7fcbdg5db9g4189gb9d0gfc04057c515eText UUID: 3fcd13b3-0053-4db1-83a7-7d929c727440Timeline Phase Index: 65Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7d27189-9491-3758-0e99-03471823e0b1Timeline Phase Duration: 6.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  226.Player: As you've mentioned it, how old are you anyway?!Halsin_InParty_Even_ToldPlayerHisAgeHalsin_InParty_Event_AgeSubjectRaisedHalsin_InParty_Even_ToldPlayerHisAge

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6f88e522-6ba9-10d8-3373-cb1de5dce05cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h98b4273bgb0bfg4e35gb168g0dad4f0bcf4cText UUID: 2e5b6cbd-2d0e-4e28-8566-09fde1dcbcb4Show Once: True
                  • •
                    361.Halsin: 350 years young. I've been privileged to watch saplings grow into mighty boughs.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bac7daa7-3801-3458-2673-fa0d0fcc9293Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hdb88088ag5ec7g4602g8c6dg08c17594dec9Text UUID: a28ffddf-3cb0-4b23-a496-ba0dc621164cTimeline Phase Index: 21Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bac7daa7-3801-3458-2673-fa0d0fcc9293Timeline Phase Duration: 8.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  476.Player: Thank you for sharing.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fddc37b3-5e60-6dac-2d1c-b9b7b9b2db8dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he228c1fdg5c6bg48e9gb50eg4b5779bdd339Text UUID: 0791443f-52da-4318-b243-78b75149d714Show Once: True
                  • +
                    11.Halsin: Thank me by returning the favour, why don't you? Come on - I've sure you've got something better than carving wooden ducks.Halsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittling

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Dialog | speaker 1 Player
                    • Halsin_InParty_Event_AskedAboutWhittling {9a2ca083-a0ac-89a1-8f19-d970097acb0d} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 071e2b48-6eb5-2f62-bcd6-b189d5ea2a27Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha3e20fa8g6866g4033gb137gd73324b03c7eText UUID: 233c87d3-c347-47db-8bb4-9b59fde18b6dTimeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 071e2b48-6eb5-2f62-bcd6-b189d5ea2a27Timeline Phase Duration: 9.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                    • +
                      246.Player: I despise sunsets, slow wits - and small talk.Lae'zel

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7d4d709a-bdaa-2414-2297-10c4e5e1bfafSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbfe9d35cgae59g4f94gb0ccg84649e5bab8dText UUID: 96e25d4e-18bc-49b5-b41c-4a5a596bf541Show Once: True
                      • +
                        20.Halsin: Luckily there's nothing small about getting to know someone like you. There's little occasion for frivolity in nature - I can appreciate your stance... even if others do not.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0c81752d-14e8-d30d-9a1c-008e7d22aba6Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h9e8e2199g0356g4db1gb0dag90c622a4a6d8Text UUID: 3c0e4f1d-7a85-4dca-8af4-f08c71ec3ae0Timeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0c81752d-14e8-d30d-9a1c-008e7d22aba6Timeline Phase Duration: 12.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • •
                          452.Jump to Node 101

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: JumpUUID: f0fc6343-3385-5e05-ff6d-7638700cee3bJump Target: Node 101 (3053729c-9046-dbc8-ff9b-18aeeac0a5e5)Jump Target Point: 2
                    • +
                      360.Player: I've always wanted a child of my own. Perhaps one day, when peace visits the Coast.Wyll

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b9a1ca1a-ff83-156d-69f2-3bc15659c7d6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb1328fd8g9628g48c1ga1c3g288ae4dc4deeText UUID: beeb0b5b-b26b-4e66-9b5c-05ad2ec5e071Show Once: True
                      • +
                        445.Halsin: I think I know how you feel... duty, eh? I hope your wish comes true. We'll need new life once all this is over.note: Smiles wistfully on 'duty, eh?'

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ec67a917-2341-ac25-e556-4112ede047f3Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd7383cbbgd03fg4419gb30fg781c0bc8ca42Text UUID: 6ea53ea2-77e3-4f06-a685-a05efa9a5628Timeline Phase Index: 69Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ec67a917-2341-ac25-e556-4112ede047f3Timeline Phase Duration: 10.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • See Node 452 Jump to Node 101
                    • +
                      323.Player: Well, I have something of a soft spot for animals... though I've never had a pet, that I'm aware of.Shadowheart

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a5e5374f-e660-706d-f56e-cd5b0709cfc4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha1c7c5eag9b39g42c8g9d01g80bb823d370aText UUID: 3e40d0a7-a342-4649-856a-7b251715e670Show Once: True
                      • +
                        364.Halsin: Ha! Pet ownership is an illusion - nature's creatures choose their own companions. No one has true mastery over them in the end. As it should be.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd465b3c-41d3-c1eb-2135-b7f6ed20522bSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h2c53c0c6g7a9cg413agb87eg23faa76088a7Text UUID: 930db4dc-74d4-4f97-b2bc-da971c40b7a4Timeline Phase Index: 29Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd465b3c-41d3-c1eb-2135-b7f6ed20522bTimeline Phase Duration: 16.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: bd465b3c-41d3-c1eb-2135-b7f6ed20522bGroup Index: 0Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • +
                          374.Halsin: But it heartens me to learn you and I share the same admiration.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1b09ac0-47c4-7b5f-ce00-88b448fe7b94Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h235cb4c3g146ag466aga96dg4d9fb0eaabe5Text UUID: e9f56903-bb1f-4a1d-a9b2-263880a5383dGroup ID: bd465b3c-41d3-c1eb-2135-b7f6ed20522bGroup Index: 1
                          • See Node 452 Jump to Node 101
                    • +
                      121.Player: I cast my first spell whilst still a babe. My mother took an awful fright when I conjured up a score of rabbits in the pantry.Gale

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3ffc2dec-d024-e76a-a050-6fe15044c5a9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0810f030g94eeg4148ga2ebge780177cd765Text UUID: e47221da-bc34-4414-a1fc-8beec9cb9016Show Once: True
                      • +
                        110.Halsin: Ha! Talented from the beginning, then? Almost a surprise you didn't cast magic in the womb.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3932b74d-ad78-c793-0000-0c17a2a71803Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h8b7eea92g3c10g403cg9bd3gfa1e90d84feeText UUID: 2da55aa4-dd0f-4170-aa24-517aeb936cd1Timeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3932b74d-ad78-c793-0000-0c17a2a71803Timeline Phase Duration: 7.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • See Node 452 Jump to Node 101
                    • +
                      53.Player: Maybe I have a sweet tooth too.Astarion

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1d4706ae-3faa-b4af-670e-a8039bce5df5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h326c4450g575dg4c10ga1f4g11ff748b3d4cText UUID: 7f479594-7ec4-4d90-80e9-35439eb325b9Show Once: True
                      • +
                        368.Halsin: Is that so? Would you seek to drizzle honey on a neck before indulging?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: befa792c-49f8-41e9-41d1-2a4294823fe9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h1af275bdg16c0g44f8g92f8gf998430c3224Text UUID: 37eea829-c75f-416d-8fcf-9d0178d01d1cTimeline Phase Index: 52Timeline Dialog Node UUID: befa792c-49f8-41e9-41d1-2a4294823fe9Timeline Phase Duration: 6.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • See Node 452 Jump to Node 101
                    • +
                      448.Player: When I first got to the Hells, I was so scared and lonely I adopted a pet rock. Named it Crag.Karlach

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a} = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ecb54601-91ed-7517-60a6-007efe2417ccSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha6bbad5agfa77g450cga4fdg7dc80fe073f3Text UUID: 2b8d3cdd-6845-4606-ac38-140d11e267ebShow Once: True
                      • +
                        305.Halsin: Ah, but there are no pets in nature - only companions. Though I'll admit Crag likely made for a rather stoic confidante...

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9aef5209-ab82-3188-c002-cc181e437bbaSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hee1213e6g98a5g4f65g8fa2gb8a8136e96e4Text UUID: 90092021-cf85-4660-8f74-4c92c36c6863Timeline Phase Index: 37Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9aef5209-ab82-3188-c002-cc181e437bbaTimeline Phase Duration: 9.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
                        • See Node 452 Jump to Node 101
                    • +
                      78.Player: I once stitched shut a wound using twine made from the entrails of an enemy.Githyanki

                      Flags and Tags

                      ruletagtype rule
                      • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd}

                      • +
                        75.Halsin: You are... nothing if not inventive. I can only hope the foe had already expired before you began your work.Githyanki

                        Flags and Tags

                        ruletagtype rule
                        • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd}

                        Text

                        combine=0

        473.Halsin: What would you like to know?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fba5e0b1-9787-ae1d-e30f-1814cd2295f7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: ha2e7f315ga09bg4a1bg9307g65c54b08858cText UUID: fab48a92-5f1c-4b1b-ad3f-427d11b1e3b6Timeline Phase Index: 70Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fba5e0b1-9787-ae1d-e30f-1814cd2295f7Timeline Phase Duration: 2.39sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

      390.Player: What happened before, when the shadow curse was unleashed?!ORI_Halsin_State_ToldShadowCurseHistoryCURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_AORI_Halsin_State_ToldShadowCurseHistory

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • ORI_Halsin_State_ToldShadowCurseHistory {b8c6e508-447a-4166-81c6-c3dc3ff5bfff} = False
      • CURRENTREGION_SCL_Main_A {f76b85b5-b557-4409-98fd-cc7b22f8292b} = True
      settype Global
      • ORI_Halsin_State_ToldShadowCurseHistory {b8c6e508-447a-4166-81c6-c3dc3ff5bfff} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c972ba78-30c6-0a85-635c-a7023a8c5e73Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf4e005d1g1eabg46abg8cc7g8a31525e887fText UUID: 85ca6747-2167-48b1-9dd1-57c4b16b1e90Show Once: True
      • +
        358.Halsin: Druids and Harpers joined together to put a stop to Ketheric Thorm. We marched on Moonrise and, after much fighting, we prevailed.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf167fcd0g2916g4d11g8e0fg62b19331c823Text UUID: 19c5cdb9-65d2-44f4-ac6b-dd2f8c35496eTimeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Timeline Phase Duration: 72.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Group Index: 0
        • +
          188.Halsin: Even in defeat, though, Ketheric turned to Shar. Not long after we sealed him away in his tomb, the shadow curse took hold. No one had seen the likes of it before. No one knew how to react...

          Text

          Even in defeat, though, Ketheric turned to Shar. Not long after we sealed him away in his tomb, the shadow curse took hold. No one had seen the likes of it before. No one knew how to react...
          h5d5bf6e2g7499g4c20gb25cga4e7c2bb6b73 | f028d059-d9dd-4f5b-9640-28a6c394d112 | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d900283-939f-9546-11b7-887f6e5fbae7Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h5d5bf6e2g7499g4c20gb25cga4e7c2bb6b73Text UUID: f028d059-d9dd-4f5b-9640-28a6c394d112Group ID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Group Index: 1
          • +
            9.Halsin: ...Then it started to claim all those within its reach. Those who had survived the battles now fell to the shadows - became part of the shadows. And worst of all... I lost contact with Thaniel.

            Text

            ...Then it started to claim all those within its reach. Those who had survived the battles now fell to the shadows - became part of the shadows. And worst of all... I lost contact with Thaniel.
            haa2c48a1g9631g414eg91fdg88ff5b4364dc | 190188f5-afea-4a94-b1c1-4b303fda08cd | stub

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04f8e679-7f8d-fd6c-125f-8879e9f11010Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: haa2c48a1g9631g414eg91fdg88ff5b4364dcText UUID: 190188f5-afea-4a94-b1c1-4b303fda08cdGroup ID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Group Index: 2
            • +
              471.Halsin: I wanted to try and find him, but we couldn't stay - we would have all succumbed. When the Archdruid of the Grove - my predecessor - was seized by the curse, I had to lead the survivors to safety.

              Text

              I wanted to try and find him, but we couldn't stay - we would have all succumbed. When the Archdruid of the Grove - my predecessor - was seized by the curse, I had to lead the survivors to safety.
              h91eb6754g5581g46d5gb5aag2a319ea33be3 | e011e47e-9c12-496e-84ea-aa8a61f8ae55 | stub

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa71436c-098d-3e95-2f09-af3180512fcbSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h91eb6754g5581g46d5gb5aag2a319ea33be3Text UUID: e011e47e-9c12-496e-84ea-aa8a61f8ae55Group ID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Group Index: 3
              • +
                280.Halsin: That was my first day as Archdruid. An inauspicious beginning.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 90224094-2712-17fe-32d9-41d8ace84a00Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h7855e2d3gd54fg4d21g8e71gfdec8d69ec37Text UUID: df06e8fa-5860-4ead-b93a-804c8d84a1bcGroup ID: b93cb90c-49f2-d40d-7e07-96139361ac25Group Index: 4
                • +
                  193.Player: Inauspicious? Sounds like you did what you had to, and saved lives.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 60fa61cb-b2f0-2ec3-2fd3-a8b4bdf7e0a0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2f71796dg126bg4809gbb22g3877a9d04a67Text UUID: 57e56dce-3a1f-4637-8049-b564b0bf722eShow Once: True
                  • +
                    130.Halsin: You are right. But I must not lose focus until everything has been put right. I've wasted too much time already - years in which nature has suffered.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45365726-8c56-9322-0c30-1c586c903936Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hedd6952bgefafg4d91ga092g366e983b15f2Text UUID: 2738d8d0-f17b-4667-a180-40eab7a4ef7fTimeline Phase Index: 184Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 45365726-8c56-9322-0c30-1c586c903936Timeline Phase Duration: 14.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • •
                      169.Jump to Node 338

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 565a8d7c-7811-7d9d-00f6-b8a484ed8cc0Jump Target: Node 338 (addef3bf-04a8-4df3-b1d9-a1a5b93c800a)Jump Target Point: 2
                • +
                  168.Player: Not every day as a leader can be a glorious one.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 560391a6-2ed9-0186-81f2-560671c1c1d1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9a956294g9d0dg4125g8c13g437c5a9b47beText UUID: 548b3456-b086-4415-86d1-371985878478Show Once: True
                  • +
                    153.Halsin: Indeed. I know that all too well.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f3a9308-aeff-1e07-67c6-581962697c78Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h6a2ae0eega43fg4481g8d4ag7ee7401c54abText UUID: 9f15e225-d9ec-4722-8c6e-a6e4e1dfebd4Timeline Phase Index: 189Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f3a9308-aeff-1e07-67c6-581962697c78Timeline Phase Duration: 4.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 169 Jump to Node 338
                • +
                  182.Player: That's in the past. You've faced the curse, and rescued Thaniel from the Shadowfell.!GLO_Ketheric_State_Dead

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • GLO_Ketheric_State_Dead {668558ed-0052-0777-64f7-a8a197c40cc5} = False

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5c2d25a9-249d-6579-e749-204beb3059e4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9001134ag9cb5g4385ga9c6gf679b43d2dceText UUID: cdfb93c5-e34a-472e-a08c-115e798cc42bShow Once: True
                  • +
                    402.Halsin: You're right. But the work is not yet done - not while Ketheric Thorm still draws breath.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cfed9294-2eb6-5bba-ec1f-0804bb6555beSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h1a9b46efg0a15g4b37g9546g24e16255db81Text UUID: 4185e604-4e3f-40fb-987e-a6e78ec38a84Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cfed9294-2eb6-5bba-ec1f-0804bb6555beTimeline Phase Duration: 9.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 169 Jump to Node 338
                • +
                  165.Player: Thaniel is safe, Ketheric is dead, and soon the curse will be no more. You have nothing left to prove.GLO_Ketheric_State_Dead

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • GLO_Ketheric_State_Dead {668558ed-0052-0777-64f7-a8a197c40cc5} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 54b79131-e6f3-b9f5-c422-034bb79eee8eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h45112f43ge6afg4579g8f68ga8c49e82d5d8Text UUID: 3cb5eefa-be94-4a1d-b6c4-13e33ca2b7c4Show Once: True
                  • +
                    413.Halsin: You're right. I should not let the failures of the past sour the victories of the present. We have achieved something immense here.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d65e1ce6-964c-2a63-09a7-b6de1f0139feSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hf3a8a47eg67c7g4a7fga836g5b12268b9017Text UUID: 3d05a8c2-c8da-4273-829c-f29a84a5a8e2Timeline Phase Index: 176Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d65e1ce6-964c-2a63-09a7-b6de1f0139feTimeline Phase Duration: 17sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: d65e1ce6-964c-2a63-09a7-b6de1f0139feGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      236.Halsin: I will never forget your part in this. Nor will Thaniel.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 77b0efe2-e4f3-7dde-a2ed-a2dcfcbb0390Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h57bb0f98g9779g4802g9640ge8a5105df9b2Text UUID: 36974a24-0a0a-445c-9b3d-00c4de4ce60cGroup ID: d65e1ce6-964c-2a63-09a7-b6de1f0139feGroup Index: 1
                      • See Node 169 Jump to Node 338
    • +
      143.Player: Consider telling him the truth - that you worship Lady Shar.!ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipperShadowheart

      • +
        208.Narrator: *Surely he will understand. You've developed a strong bond with him already... but perhaps you've waited too long? The revelation could damage the trust you've built.*Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin

          Metadata

          Node Type: JumpUUID: a558bed2-3f94-4aa8-b474-17cee388044dJump Target: Node 403 (d033f149-7c33-4670-af32-672d3a6979b5)Jump Target Point: 2
      • +
        263.Narrator: *How might he take it? Difficult to say. You have some rapport with him, but is it enough? You won't know for sure until you tell him...*Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin
        • Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2 {91cfff92-fb1e-caf5-9d5c-9c5971b96d04} = True

        • See Node 322 Jump to Node 403
      • +
        403.Narrator: *A terrible idea, surely. He barely tolerates you as it is - the chances that he'll show understanding are vanishingly slim.*!Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin

        • +
          32.Player: Take a deep breath and confess the truth to Halsin. You are a worshipper of Lady Shar.Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Object | speaker 0 Halsin
          • Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2 {98ca7185-0f2d-4420-be81-2b7c5e109e91} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 131f4e5d-7ff8-420c-a73c-daf11ab30c01Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hac81c622gd808g497fg8205g70ab852cbd55Text UUID: 3e3a844c-c0cd-40ff-9cd3-f3ef4203a92cShow Once: True
          • +
            72.Halsin: I see... Foolhardy, perhaps, to reveal such a thing to a veteran of battles against Shar worshippers. Foolhardy... or brave.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

            Flags and Tags

            settype Global
            • ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper {634f858d-9b54-0711-e31f-075d304422ab} = True

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 22fcb2db-7233-442c-998b-f654c2376362Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h10ef4c1dgfc4ag4d79g94afg8ea1943bea4eText UUID: 092ab81f-0c96-4560-adf4-2865ee4130e6Timeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 22fcb2db-7233-442c-998b-f654c2376362Timeline Phase Duration: 13.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              430.Halsin: I have no love for your goddess, or the foul things she unleashed upon nature. But I can appreciate your honesty. There is nobility in your conduct, if not in your allegiance.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ddf04c60-06e8-1b0a-8ae9-760a201308d3Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hdf73f406gf9edg4b56ga3aeg137c29a21e3eText UUID: f8d6c97c-7188-46aa-95c2-363ad8c1be59Timeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ddf04c60-06e8-1b0a-8ae9-760a201308d3Timeline Phase Duration: 16.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID

              426.Halsin: A Shar worshipper... I see. It can't have been easy for you to tell me such a thing, given my history. But I am glad you took the plunge.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global

            317.Failure

              231.Halsin: A Shar worshipper... I see. Perhaps you feared how I would react, but still... you should have told me sooner.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper {634f858d-9b54-0711-e31f-075d304422ab} = True

              • +
                367.Halsin: You were not even born when Shar's followers slew my fellow druids, or when her shadow curse tainted the land. I can get past those... but I truly wish you had trusted me sooner.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be912890-ba90-8a3b-fcd6-c26dcb80262eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hd0cb2086g955eg48e6g9e36g1baa71ce2098Text UUID: c4e50f5e-a533-425a-a8a9-a0491207c0fcGroup ID: 72ca1a47-b418-40bc-ae26-a33774182357Group Index: 1

              52.Halsin: You worship Shar? That umbral witch unleashed a plague of darkness on nature - her followers slew many of my fellow druids.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

              Flags and Tags

              settype Global
              • ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper {634f858d-9b54-0711-e31f-075d304422ab} = True

              • +
                257.Halsin: You are lucky that we share common purpose. In most other cases, this revelation would put us on opposite sides of the battlefield.

                Metadata

      • •
        30.Halsin: No... nothing of the sort. But that is not to say it isn't connected. Best be careful, all the same.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 11e03cbc-e235-4a5d-a613-d9ad2acc7c41Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h3f2725fdg25bcg4f51g9e3bg497c2414c9a5Text UUID: 071328b0-09d9-4ef4-b965-28ec3fce800bTimeline Phase Index: 146Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 11e03cbc-e235-4a5d-a613-d9ad2acc7c41Timeline Phase Duration: 8.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      415.Player: I yearn to kill. I only feel like myself when I'm killing.!NIGHT_DarkUrge_IsobelKillOrder!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_ViolentDark UrgeORI_DarkUrge_Knows_Violent

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • NIGHT_DarkUrge_IsobelKillOrder {52916fa3-a23e-43b3-af5e-a41875ce7f47} = False

      • •
        440.Halsin: The urge to kill is common in nature - for some creatures it is the core of their being... Still, though, you seem to speak of a darker impulse. Be careful how it manifests itself.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e8f1f1cb-1032-4e5b-9352-1f90a30a511cSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: hc2e8a2dbg94bag4831gae7dgf6948e120a83Text UUID: 62cb0415-01d1-478c-bd8e-dcc28048c20dTimeline Phase Index: 80Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e8f1f1cb-1032-4e5b-9352-1f90a30a511cTimeline Phase Duration: 17.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      96.Player: I have been gifted with the Slayer, a form most evil.ORI_DarkUrge_State_GivenSlayerForm!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_BraggedSlayerFormDark UrgeORI_DarkUrge_Knows_BraggedSlayerForm

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2fbc108f-3229-4293-bc53-462b880c230fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8ff24800gc747g4517g8241g8241d18ea878Text UUID: b196463d-2337-4089-8ce6-d9aa10468d24Show Once: True
      • •
        378.Halsin: Most unnatural. Most foul. Nature is a cycle of life and death, yet this form only serves death. Worse - it only serves murder.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c4465c7a-74ae-4e01-af70-a931b2c65c3eSpeaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h30104503g5ae6g414dgbebdg3f8e8037a297Text UUID: 94ad471b-52f9-4fef-9456-cf8c62890b6fTimeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c4465c7a-74ae-4e01-af70-a931b2c65c3eTimeline Phase Duration: 14.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +
      7.Player: I understand my affliction at last - I am a Bhaalspawn. The Lord of Murder compels me.!ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalAccepted!ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalResistedORI_State_DarkUrge_KnowsBhaalspawn!ORI_DarkUrge_State_BhaalDisappointed!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_DiscussedBhaalspawn+1 moreORI_DarkUrge_Knows_DiscussedBhaalspawn

      • •
        162.Halsin: You are a mortal child of Bhaal? Be careful with whom you share that fact - I hear many of your kind have met premature ends.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5356c7b6-c853-4720-adbe-bd8b252f6530Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: had03f511ga6efg4b06ga196gb0b7bf8d1895Text UUID: 2ba2ed4b-5256-4e7f-b630-420a6757532fTimeline Phase Index: 195Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5356c7b6-c853-4720-adbe-bd8b252f6530Timeline Phase Duration: 13.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +

        205.Halsin: And a hard-won freedom at that. Well done.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 645f4398-2427-4eed-8fc7-8f530a094ab9Speaker: 0 (Halsin)Text Handle: h29c4c9bdg025cg419dgb49egc8eddc0405bfText UUID: 37d59bd8-21ce-4e82-8f78-4c26fa36d014Timeline Phase Index: 166Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 645f4398-2427-4eed-8fc7-8f530a094ab9Timeline Phase Duration: 5.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
    • +

        210.Halsin: Nature bows to none. It will fight on and survive, no matter what madness your god has inspired you to undertake.

        Metadata
